---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

#school="D:
#setwd("D:/DesktopDocuments/Documents/PHD/Studies/Bombus_impatiens/Bimpatiens_MaternalBrainGeneExpression/RNASeqAnalysis/BimpMB_RNAanalysis/GSEA")

#home="H:
setwd("H:/DesktopDocuments/Documents/PHD/Studies/Bombus_impatiens/Bimpatiens_MaternalBrainGeneExpression/RNASeqAnalysis/BimpMB_RNAanalysis/GSEA")
```

```{r loadpackages, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, include=TRUE}
#Library Necessary Packages
library(tidyverse)
library(lattice)
library(lintr)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(topGO)
library(rrvgo)
library(org.Dm.eg.db)
library(writexl)
library(openxlsx)
library(edgeR)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
```


```{r sessioninformation, echo=FALSE}
installed.packages()[names(sessionInfo()$otherPkgs), "Version"]
```

# Data Preperation for GO Enrichment Analysis
In 2022, I used the following resource to work through the GO analysis:
https://bioconductor.org/packages/release/bioc/vignettes/topGO/inst/doc/topGO.pdf. I am building this analysis using the same resource and work through.

## Load in Gene Data
```{r LoadinGeneData, echo=FALSE}
#pulling from the document of DEG results. This contains all filtered genes and the genes are the same across the DEG analyses, just with different pairwise results.
filteredGeneList <- read.csv2(file = "../DEG/DEGFullResults/DEGananalysisResults_FLWMLW.csv", header=TRUE, sep=",")
rownames(filteredGeneList) <- filteredGeneList$X
filteredGeneList <- filteredGeneList[,-1]

```


## Data preparation
### Read in Mapping File
```{r readinannotation}
#read in the GO annotation file for BIMP
#GAF file was downloaded from NCBI 2/13/2024 (BIMP 2.2) and modified to include the go ids, terms, and definitions
#https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/datasets/genome/?taxon=132113    Selected BIMP_2.2
gene2mapping <- readMappings("Gene2GoMap_unique.txt", sep = " ", IDsep=",")
```


### 'Universe' Gene List
```{r allgeneslist}
#List of all genes
geneUniverse <- rownames(filteredGeneList) #give list of all gene names
#This was the filtered Set used in the DEG analysis

length(geneUniverse)
```

### Build GoData object
Using the following resource as a guide: https://ucdavis-bioinformatics-training.github.io/2018-June-RNA-Seq-Workshop/friday/enrichment.html
```{r geneSel.fun}
#function that returns genes < 0.05 adj pvalue
topDiffGenes <- function(allScore){
  return(allScore < 0.05)
}
```


# GSEA by Pairwise Comparisions 

## Across Castes
### FLW v FLQ
#### 'Gene' list for DEGs
```{r degsgeneslistFLWFLQ}
DEG.data.FLWFLQ <- read.csv2(file = "../DEG/DEGFullResults/DEGananalysisResults_FLWFLQ.csv", header=TRUE, sep=",")
rownames(DEG.data.FLWFLQ ) <- DEG.data.FLWFLQ$X
DEG.data.FLWFLQ  <- DEG.data.FLWFLQ [,-1]
```


I discovered that having NAs in the padj is a problem when running the KS test via: https://www.biostars.org/p/91474/. Removed the NAs to move forward.
```{r removeNAs_FLWFLQ}
table(is.na(DEG.data.FLWFLQ$padj))
NAlist_FLWFLQ <- which(is.na(DEG.data.FLWFLQ$padj))
rownames(DEG.data.FLWFLQ)[NAlist_FLWFLQ]

#gene list for topgo input
DEG.genelist.FLWFLQ  <- as.numeric(DEG.data.FLWFLQ$padj)
names(DEG.genelist.FLWFLQ) <- geneUniverse


##NEED TO REMOVE NAs IN PADJ TO PROCEED
#VERIFY SAME POSITIONS ACROSS ALL PAIRWISE
FLWFLQ_napos <- which(is.na(DEG.genelist.FLWFLQ), arr.ind = TRUE)

#List of NA genes removed
FLWFLQ_napos


#Create a new data frame to use going forward W/O those padj NAs
#This is needed for the KS tests
DEG.genelist.FLWFLQ <- DEG.genelist.FLWFLQ[-FLWFLQ_napos]
length(DEG.genelist.FLWFLQ)

#get an idea of the top diff genes
table(topDiffGenes(DEG.genelist.FLWFLQ))
table(DEG.genelist.FLWFLQ < 0.05)

```


#### BP
```{r BP_DEG}
DEgenes.FLWFLQ.GO.bp <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "BP", "FLWFLQ", sep = "_"), 
                ontology = "BP",
                allGenes = DEG.genelist.FLWFLQ, # all genes in the "universe" aka our experiment
                geneSel = topDiffGenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLWFLQ.bp_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLWFLQ.GO.bp, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLWFLQ.bp_result_fisher

DEG_BP.FLWFLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLWFLQ.GO.bp, 
                                raw.p.value = DEG.FLWFLQ.bp_result_fisher, 
                                topNodes = 50, 
                                numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG_BP.FLWFLQ.table, "Results/ByOntology/FLWFLQ_BPTerms.csv")

```

#### MF
```{r mf_DEG}
DEgenes.FLWFLQ.GO.mf <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "MF", "FLWFLQ", sep = "_"), 
                ontology = "MF",
                allGenes = DEG.genelist.FLWFLQ, # all genes in the "universe" aka our experiment
                geneSel = topDiffGenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLWFLQ.mf_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLWFLQ.GO.mf, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLWFLQ.mf_result_fisher

DEG_MF.FLWFLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLWFLQ.GO.mf, 
                                raw.p.value = DEG.FLWFLQ.mf_result_fisher, 
                                topNodes = 50, numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG_MF.FLWFLQ.table, "Results/ByOntology/FLWFLQ_MFTerms.csv")
```



#### CC
```{r cc_DEG}
DEgenes.FLWFLQ.GO.cc <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "CC", "FLWFLQ", sep = "_"), 
                ontology = "CC",
                allGenes = DEG.genelist.FLWFLQ, # all genes in the "universe" aka our experiment
                geneSel = topDiffGenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLWFLQ.cc_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLWFLQ.GO.cc, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLWFLQ.cc_result_fisher

DEG_CC.FLWFLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLWFLQ.GO.cc, 
                                raw.p.value = DEG.FLWFLQ.cc_result_fisher, 
                                topNodes = 50,
                                numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG_CC.FLWFLQ.table, "Results/ByOntology/FLWFLQ_CCTerms.csv")
```


```{r largetable.DEG_Node=1}
#ALL
DEG_BP.FLWFLQ.table <- cbind(DEG_BP.FLWFLQ.table, ontology=rep("BP", length(DEG_BP.FLWFLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG_MF.FLWFLQ.table <- cbind(DEG_MF.FLWFLQ.table, ontology=rep("MF", length(DEG_MF.FLWFLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG_CC.FLWFLQ.table <- cbind(DEG_CC.FLWFLQ.table, ontology=rep("CC", length(DEG_CC.FLWFLQ.table$GO.ID)))

DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ <-rbind(DEG_BP.FLWFLQ.table, DEG_MF.FLWFLQ.table, DEG_CC.FLWFLQ.table)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ, "Results/AllGosOntologyCombined/DEGs_GOallontology_FLWFLQ.csv")


#Less than .01
DEG_BP.FLWFLQ.table.01 <- DEG_BP.FLWFLQ.table[DEG_BP.FLWFLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG_MF.FLWFLQ.table.01 <- DEG_MF.FLWFLQ.table[DEG_MF.FLWFLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG_CC.FLWFLQ.table.01 <- DEG_CC.FLWFLQ.table[DEG_CC.FLWFLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]

DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.01 <-rbind(DEG_BP.FLWFLQ.table.01, DEG_MF.FLWFLQ.table.01, DEG_CC.FLWFLQ.table.01)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.01, "Results/DEGs_GOallontology_FLWFLQ.01.csv")
```


#### Pull out genes for Significant Go terms




### MLW v MLQ
#### 'Gene' list for DEGs
```{r degsgeneslistMLWMLQ}
DEG.data.MLWMLQ <- read.csv2(file = "../DEG/DEGFullResults/DEGananalysisResults_MLWMLQ.csv", header=TRUE, sep=",")
rownames(DEG.data.MLWMLQ) <- DEG.data.MLWMLQ$X
DEG.data.MLWMLQ <- DEG.data.MLWMLQ[,-1]
```


I discovered that having NAs in the padj is a problem when running the KS test via: https://www.biostars.org/p/91474/. Removed the NAs to move forward.
```{r removeNAs_MLWMLQ}
table(is.na(DEG.data.MLWMLQ$padj))
NAlist_MLWMLQ <- which(is.na(DEG.data.MLWMLQ$padj))
rownames(DEG.data.MLWMLQ)[NAlist_MLWMLQ]

#gene list for topgo input
DEG.genelist.MLWMLQ  <- as.numeric(DEG.data.MLWMLQ$padj)
names(DEG.genelist.MLWMLQ) <- geneUniverse


##NEED TO REMOVE NAs IN PADJ TO PROCEED
#VERIFY SAME POSITIONS ACROSS ALL PAIRWISE
MLWMLQ_napos <- which(is.na(DEG.genelist.MLWMLQ), arr.ind = TRUE)



#Create a new data frame to use going forward W/O those padj NAs
#This is needed for the KS tests
DEG.genelist.MLWMLQ <- DEG.genelist.MLWMLQ[-MLWMLQ_napos]

#get an idea of the top diff genes
table(topDiffGenes(DEG.genelist.MLWMLQ))
table(DEG.genelist.MLWMLQ < 0.05)
```


#### BP
```{r BP_DEG_MLWMLQ}
DEgenes.MLWMLQ.GO.bp <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "BP", "MLWMLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "BP",
                allGenes = DEG.genelist.MLWMLQ, # all genes in the "universe" aka our experiment
                geneSel = topDiffGenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.MLWMLQ.bp_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.MLWMLQ.GO.bp, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.MLWMLQ.bp_result_fisher

DEG_BP.MLWMLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.MLWMLQ.GO.bp, 
                                raw.p.value = DEG.MLWMLQ.bp_result_fisher, 
                                topNodes = 50, 
                                numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG_BP.MLWMLQ.table, "Results/ByOntology/MLWMLQ_BPTerms.csv")
```

#### MF
```{r mf_DEG_MLWMLQ}
DEgenes.MLWMLQ.GO.mf <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "MF", "MLWMLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "MF",
                allGenes = DEG.genelist.MLWMLQ, # all genes in the "universe" aka our experiment
                geneSel = topDiffGenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.MLWMLQ.mf_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.MLWMLQ.GO.mf, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.MLWMLQ.mf_result_fisher

DEG_MF.MLWMLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.MLWMLQ.GO.mf, 
                                raw.p.value = DEG.MLWMLQ.mf_result_fisher, 
                                topNodes = 50, 
                                numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG_MF.MLWMLQ.table, "Results/ByOntology/MLWMLQ_MFTerms.csv")
```



#### CC
```{r cc_DEG_MLWMLQ}
DEgenes.MLWMLQ.GO.cc <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "CC", "MLWMLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "CC",
                allGenes = DEG.genelist.MLWMLQ, # all genes in the "universe" aka our experiment
                geneSel = topDiffGenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.MLWMLQ.cc_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.MLWMLQ.GO.cc, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.MLWMLQ.cc_result_fisher

DEG_CC.MLWMLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.MLWMLQ.GO.cc, 
                                raw.p.value = DEG.MLWMLQ.cc_result_fisher, 
                                topNodes = 50, 
                                numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG_CC.MLWMLQ.table, "Results/ByOntology/MLWMLQ_CCTerms.csv")
```


```{r MLWMLQlargetable.DEG_Node=1}
#ALL
DEG_BP.MLWMLQ.table <- cbind(DEG_BP.MLWMLQ.table, ontology=rep("BP", length(DEG_BP.MLWMLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG_MF.MLWMLQ.table <- cbind(DEG_MF.MLWMLQ.table, ontology=rep("MF", length(DEG_MF.MLWMLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG_CC.MLWMLQ.table <- cbind(DEG_CC.MLWMLQ.table, ontology=rep("CC", length(DEG_CC.MLWMLQ.table$GO.ID)))

DEG_GOallontology.MLWMLQ <-rbind(DEG_BP.MLWMLQ.table, DEG_MF.MLWMLQ.table, DEG_CC.MLWMLQ.table)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.MLWMLQ, "Results/AllGosOntologyCombined/DEGs_GOallontology_MLWMLQ.csv")


#Less than .01
DEG_BP.MLWMLQ.table.01 <- DEG_BP.MLWMLQ.table[DEG_BP.MLWMLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG_MF.MLWMLQ.table.01 <- DEG_MF.MLWMLQ.table[DEG_MF.MLWMLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG_CC.MLWMLQ.table.01 <- DEG_CC.MLWMLQ.table[DEG_CC.MLWMLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]

DEG_GOallontology.MLWMLQ.01 <-rbind(DEG_BP.MLWMLQ.table.01, DEG_MF.MLWMLQ.table.01, DEG_CC.MLWMLQ.table.01)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.MLWMLQ.01, "Results/DEGs_GOallontology_MLWMLQ.01.csv")

```



### QLW v QLQ
#### 'Gene' list for DEGs
```{r degsgeneslistQLWQLQ}
DEG.data.QLWQLQ <- read.csv2(file = "../DEG/DEGFullResults/DEGananalysisResults_QLWQLQ.csv", header=TRUE, sep=",")
rownames(DEG.data.QLWQLQ) <- DEG.data.QLWQLQ$X
DEG.data.QLWQLQ <- DEG.data.QLWQLQ[,-1]
```


I discovered that having NAs in the padj is a problem when running the _fisher test via: https://www.biostars.org/p/91474/. Removed the NAs to move forward.
```{r removeNAs_QLWQLQ}
table(is.na(DEG.data.QLWQLQ$padj))
NAlist_QLWQLQ <- which(is.na(DEG.data.QLWQLQ$padj))
rownames(DEG.data.QLWQLQ)[NAlist_QLWQLQ]

#gene list for topgo input
DEG.genelist.QLWQLQ  <- as.numeric(DEG.data.QLWQLQ$padj)
names(DEG.genelist.QLWQLQ) <- geneUniverse


##NEED TO REMOVE NAs IN PADJ TO PROCEED
#VERIFY SAME POSITIONS ACROSS ALL PAIRWISE
QLWQLQ_napos <- which(is.na(DEG.genelist.QLWQLQ), arr.ind = TRUE)



#Create a new data frame to use going forward W/O those padj NAs
#This is needed for the _fisher tests
DEG.genelist.QLWQLQ <- DEG.genelist.QLWQLQ[-QLWQLQ_napos]

table(topDiffGenes(DEG.genelist.QLWQLQ))
table(DEG.genelist.QLWQLQ < 0.05)
```


#### BP
```{r BP_DEG_QLWQLQ}
DEgenes.QLWQLQ.GO.bp <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "BP", "QLWQLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "BP",
                allGenes = DEG.genelist.QLWQLQ, # all genes in the "universe" aka our experiment
                geneSel = topDiffGenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.QLWQLQ.bp_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.QLWQLQ.GO.bp, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.QLWQLQ.bp_result_fisher

DEG_BP.QLWQLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.QLWQLQ.GO.bp, 
                                raw.p.value = DEG.QLWQLQ.bp_result_fisher, 
                                topNodes = 50, 
                                numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG_BP.QLWQLQ.table, "Results/ByOntology/QLWQLQ_BPTerms.csv")
```

#### MF
```{r mf_DEG_QLWQLQ}
DEgenes.QLWQLQ.GO.mf <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "MF", "QLWQLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "MF",
                allGenes = DEG.genelist.QLWQLQ, # all genes in the "universe" aka our experiment
                geneSel = topDiffGenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.QLWQLQ.mf_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.QLWQLQ.GO.mf, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.QLWQLQ.mf_result_fisher

DEG_MF.QLWQLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.QLWQLQ.GO.mf, 
                                raw.p.value = DEG.QLWQLQ.mf_result_fisher, 
                                topNodes = 50,
                                numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG_MF.QLWQLQ.table, "Results/ByOntology/QLWQLQ_MFTerms.csv")
```



#### CC
```{r cc_DEG_QLWQLQ}
DEgenes.QLWQLQ.GO.cc <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "CC", "QLWQLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "CC",
                allGenes = DEG.genelist.QLWQLQ, # all genes in the "universe" aka our experiment
                geneSel = topDiffGenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.QLWQLQ.cc_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.QLWQLQ.GO.cc, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.QLWQLQ.cc_result_fisher

DEG_CC.QLWQLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.QLWQLQ.GO.cc, 
                                raw.p.value = DEG.QLWQLQ.cc_result_fisher,
                                topNodes = 50, 
                                numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG_CC.QLWQLQ.table, "Results/ByOntology/QLWQLQ_CCTerms.csv")
```


```{r QLWQLQlargetable.DEG_Node=1}
#ALL
DEG_BP.QLWQLQ.table <- cbind(DEG_BP.QLWQLQ.table, ontology=rep("BP", length(DEG_BP.QLWQLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG_MF.QLWQLQ.table <- cbind(DEG_MF.QLWQLQ.table, ontology=rep("MF", length(DEG_MF.QLWQLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG_CC.QLWQLQ.table <- cbind(DEG_CC.QLWQLQ.table, ontology=rep("CC", length(DEG_CC.QLWQLQ.table$GO.ID)))

DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ <-rbind(DEG_BP.QLWQLQ.table, DEG_MF.QLWQLQ.table, DEG_CC.QLWQLQ.table)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ, "Results/AllGosOntologyCombined/DEGs_GOallontology_QLWQLQ.csv")


#Less than .01
DEG_BP.QLWQLQ.table.01 <- DEG_BP.QLWQLQ.table[DEG_BP.QLWQLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG_MF.QLWQLQ.table.01 <- DEG_MF.QLWQLQ.table[DEG_MF.QLWQLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG_CC.QLWQLQ.table.01 <- DEG_CC.QLWQLQ.table[DEG_CC.QLWQLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]

DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ.01 <-rbind(DEG_BP.QLWQLQ.table.01, DEG_MF.QLWQLQ.table.01, DEG_CC.QLWQLQ.table.01)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ.01, "Results/DEGs_GOallontology_QLWQLQ.01.csv")
```




## Within Castes--WORKERS
### FLW v MLW
#### 'Gene' list for DEGs
```{r degsgeneslistFLWMLW}
DEG.data.FLWMLW <- read.csv2(file = "../DEG/DEGFullResults/DEGananalysisResults_FLWMLW.csv", header=TRUE, sep=",")
rownames(DEG.data.FLWMLW) <- DEG.data.FLWMLW$X
DEG.data.FLWMLW <- DEG.data.FLWMLW[,-1]
```


I discovered that having NAs in the padj is a problem when running the _fisher test via: https://www.biostars.org/p/91474/. Removed the NAs to move forward.
```{r removeNAs_FLWMLW}
table(is.na(DEG.data.FLWMLW$padj))
NAlist_FLWMLW <- which(is.na(DEG.data.FLWMLW$padj))
rownames(DEG.data.FLWMLW)[NAlist_FLWMLW]

#gene list for topgo input
DEG.genelist.FLWMLW <- as.numeric(DEG.data.FLWMLW$padj)
names(DEG.genelist.FLWMLW) <- geneUniverse


##NEED TO REMOVE NAs IN PADJ TO PROCEED
#VERIFY SAME POSITIONS ACROSS ALL PAIRWISE
FLWMLW_napos <- which(is.na(DEG.genelist.FLWMLW), arr.ind = TRUE)



#Create a new data frame to use going forward W/O those padj NAs
#This is needed for the _fisher tests
DEG.genelist.FLWMLW <- DEG.genelist.FLWMLW[-FLWMLW_napos]

table(topDiffGenes(DEG.genelist.FLWMLW))
table(DEG.genelist.FLWMLW < 0.05)

```


#### BP
```{r BP_DEG_FLWMLW}
DEgenes.FLWMLW.GO.bp <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "BP", "FLWMLW", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "BP",
                allGenes = DEG.genelist.FLWMLW, # all genes in the "universe" aka our experiment
                geneSel = topDiffGenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLWMLW.bp_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLWMLW.GO.bp, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLWMLW.bp_result_fisher

DEG_BP.FLWMLW.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLWMLW.GO.bp, 
                                raw.p.value = DEG.FLWMLW.bp_result_fisher, 
                                topNodes = 50, 
                                numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG_BP.FLWMLW.table, "Results/ByOntology/FLWMLW_BPTerms.csv")
```

#### MF
```{r mf_DEG_FLWMLW}
DEgenes.FLWMLW.GO.mf <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "MF", "FLWMLW", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "MF",
                allGenes = DEG.genelist.FLWMLW, # all genes in the "universe" aka our experiment
                geneSel = topDiffGenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLWMLW.mf_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLWMLW.GO.mf, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLWMLW.mf_result_fisher

DEG_MF.FLWMLW.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLWMLW.GO.mf,
                                raw.p.value = DEG.FLWMLW.mf_result_fisher,
                                topNodes = 50, 
                                numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG_MF.FLWMLW.table, "Results/ByOntology/FLWMLW_MFTerms.csv")
```



#### CC
```{r cc_DEG_FLWMLW}
DEgenes.FLWMLW.GO.cc <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "CC", "FLWMLW", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "CC",
                allGenes = DEG.genelist.FLWMLW, # all genes in the "universe" aka our experiment
                geneSel = topDiffGenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLWMLW.cc_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLWMLW.GO.cc, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLWMLW.cc_result_fisher

DEG_CC.FLWMLW.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLWMLW.GO.cc,
                                raw.p.value = DEG.FLWMLW.cc_result_fisher, 
                                topNodes = 50,
                                numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG_CC.FLWMLW.table, "Results/ByOntology/FLWMLW_CCTerms.csv")
```

```{r FLWMLWlargetable.DEG_Node=1}
#ALL
DEG_BP.FLWMLW.table <- cbind(DEG_BP.FLWMLW.table, ontology=rep("BP", length(DEG_BP.FLWMLW.table$GO.ID)))
DEG_MF.FLWMLW.table <- cbind(DEG_MF.FLWMLW.table, ontology=rep("MF", length(DEG_MF.FLWMLW.table$GO.ID)))
DEG_CC.FLWMLW.table <- cbind(DEG_CC.FLWMLW.table, ontology=rep("CC", length(DEG_CC.FLWMLW.table$GO.ID)))

DEG_GOallontology.FLWMLW <-rbind(DEG_BP.FLWMLW.table, DEG_MF.FLWMLW.table, DEG_CC.FLWMLW.table)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLWMLW, "Results/AllGosOntologyCombined/DEGs_GOallontology_FLWMLW.csv")


#Less than .01
DEG_BP.FLWMLW.table.01 <- DEG_BP.FLWMLW.table[DEG_BP.FLWMLW.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG_MF.FLWMLW.table.01 <- DEG_MF.FLWMLW.table[DEG_MF.FLWMLW.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG_CC.FLWMLW.table.01 <- DEG_CC.FLWMLW.table[DEG_CC.FLWMLW.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]

DEG_GOallontology.FLWMLW.01 <-rbind(DEG_BP.FLWMLW.table.01, DEG_MF.FLWMLW.table.01, DEG_CC.FLWMLW.table.01)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLWMLW.01, "Results/DEGs_GOallontology_FLWMLW.01.csv")
```



### FLW v QLW--NO DEGs
No analysis conducted because no DEGs.

### MLW v QLW--NO DEGs
No analysis conducted because no DEGs.






## Within Castes--QUEENS
### FLQ v MLQ
#### 'Gene' list for DEGs
```{r degsgeneslistFLQMLQ}
DEG.data.FLQMLQ <- read.csv2(file = "../DEG/DEGFullResults/DEGananalysisResults_FLQMLQ.csv", header=TRUE, sep=",")
rownames(DEG.data.FLQMLQ) <- DEG.data.FLQMLQ$X
DEG.data.FLQMLQ <- DEG.data.FLQMLQ[,-1]
```


I discovered that having NAs in the padj is a problem when running the KS test via: https://www.biostars.org/p/91474/. Removed the NAs to move forward.
```{r removeNAs_FLQMLQ}
table(is.na(DEG.data.FLQMLQ$padj))
NAlist_FLQMLQ <- which(is.na(DEG.data.FLQMLQ$padj))
rownames(DEG.data.FLQMLQ)[NAlist_FLQMLQ]

#gene list for topgo input
DEG.genelist.FLQMLQ <- as.numeric(DEG.data.FLQMLQ$padj)
names(DEG.genelist.FLQMLQ) <- geneUniverse


##NEED TO REMOVE NAs IN PADJ TO PROCEED
#VERIFY SAME POSITIONS ACROSS ALL PAIRWISE
FLQMLQ_napos <- which(is.na(DEG.genelist.FLQMLQ), arr.ind = TRUE)



#Create a new data frame to use going forward W/O those padj NAs
#This is needed for the _fisher tests
DEG.genelist.FLQMLQ <- DEG.genelist.FLQMLQ[-FLQMLQ_napos]


table(topDiffGenes(DEG.genelist.FLQMLQ))
table(DEG.genelist.FLQMLQ < 0.05)

```


#### BP
```{r BP_DEG_FLQMLQ}
DEgenes.FLQMLQ.GO.bp <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "BP", "FLQMLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "BP",
                allGenes = DEG.genelist.FLQMLQ, # all genes in the "universe" aka our experiment
                geneSel = topDiffGenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLQMLQ.bp_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLQMLQ.GO.bp, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLQMLQ.bp_result_fisher

DEG_BP.FLQMLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLQMLQ.GO.bp, 
                                raw.p.value = DEG.FLQMLQ.bp_result_fisher,
                                topNodes = 50, 
                                numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG_BP.FLQMLQ.table, "Results/ByOntology/FLQMLQ_BPTerms.csv")
```

#### MF
```{r mf_DEG_FLQMLQ}
DEgenes.FLQMLQ.GO.mf <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "MF", "FLQMLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "MF",
                allGenes = DEG.genelist.FLQMLQ, # all genes in the "universe" aka our experiment
                geneSel = topDiffGenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLQMLQ.mf_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLQMLQ.GO.mf, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLQMLQ.mf_result_fisher

DEG_MF.FLQMLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLQMLQ.GO.mf, 
                                raw.p.value = DEG.FLQMLQ.mf_result_fisher,
                                topNodes = 50,
                                numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG_MF.FLQMLQ.table, "Results/ByOntology/FLQMLQ_MFTerms.csv")
```



#### CC
```{r cc_DEG_FLQMLQ}
DEgenes.FLQMLQ.GO.cc <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "CC", "FLQMLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "CC",
                allGenes = DEG.genelist.FLQMLQ, # all genes in the "universe" aka our experiment
                geneSel = topDiffGenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLQMLQ.cc_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLQMLQ.GO.cc, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLQMLQ.cc_result_fisher

DEG_CC.FLQMLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLQMLQ.GO.cc, 
                                raw.p.value = DEG.FLQMLQ.cc_result_fisher,
                                topNodes = 50,
                                numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG_CC.FLQMLQ.table, "Results/ByOntology/FLQMLQ_CCTerms.csv")
```

```{r FLQMLQlargetable.DEG_Node=1}
#ALL
DEG_BP.FLQMLQ.table <- cbind(DEG_BP.FLQMLQ.table, ontology=rep("BP", length(DEG_BP.FLQMLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG_MF.FLQMLQ.table <- cbind(DEG_MF.FLQMLQ.table, ontology=rep("MF", length(DEG_MF.FLQMLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG_CC.FLQMLQ.table <- cbind(DEG_CC.FLQMLQ.table, ontology=rep("CC", length(DEG_CC.FLQMLQ.table$GO.ID)))

DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ <-rbind(DEG_BP.FLQMLQ.table, DEG_MF.FLQMLQ.table, DEG_CC.FLQMLQ.table)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ, "Results/AllGosOntologyCombined/DEGs_GOallontology_FLQMLQ.csv")


#Less than .01
DEG_BP.FLQMLQ.table.01 <- DEG_BP.FLQMLQ.table[DEG_BP.FLQMLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG_MF.FLQMLQ.table.01 <- DEG_MF.FLQMLQ.table[DEG_MF.FLQMLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG_CC.FLQMLQ.table.01 <- DEG_CC.FLQMLQ.table[DEG_CC.FLQMLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]

DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.01 <-rbind(DEG_BP.FLQMLQ.table.01, DEG_MF.FLQMLQ.table.01, DEG_CC.FLQMLQ.table.01)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.01, "Results/DEGs_GOallontology_FLQMLQ.01.csv")
```



### FLQ v QLQ
#### 'Gene' list for DEGs
```{r degsgeneslistFLQQLQ}
DEG.data.FLQQLQ <- read.csv2(file = "../DEG/DEGFullResults/DEGananalysisResults_FLQQLQ.csv", header=TRUE, sep=",")
rownames(DEG.data.FLQQLQ) <- DEG.data.FLQQLQ$X
DEG.data.FLQQLQ <- DEG.data.FLQQLQ[,-1]
```


I discovered that having NAs in the padj is a problem when running the _fisher test via: https://www.biostars.org/p/91474/. Removed the NAs to move forward.
```{r removeNAs_FLQQLQ}
table(is.na(DEG.data.FLQQLQ$padj))
NAlist_FLQQLQ <- which(is.na(DEG.data.FLQQLQ$padj))
rownames(DEG.data.FLQQLQ)[NAlist_FLQQLQ]

#gene list for topgo input
DEG.genelist.FLQQLQ <- as.numeric(DEG.data.FLQQLQ$padj)
names(DEG.genelist.FLQQLQ) <- geneUniverse


##NEED TO REMOVE NAs IN PADJ TO PROCEED
#VERIFY SAME POSITIONS ACROSS ALL PAIRWISE
FLQQLQ_napos <- which(is.na(DEG.genelist.FLQQLQ), arr.ind = TRUE)



#Create a new data frame to use going forward W/O those padj NAs
#This is needed for the _fisher tests
DEG.genelist.FLQQLQ <- DEG.genelist.FLQQLQ[-FLQQLQ_napos]


table(topDiffGenes(DEG.genelist.FLQQLQ))
table(DEG.genelist.FLQQLQ < 0.05)
```


#### BP
```{r BP_DEG_FLQQLQ}
DEgenes.FLQQLQ.GO.bp <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "BP", "FLQQLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "BP",
                allGenes = DEG.genelist.FLQQLQ, # all genes in the "universe" aka our experiment
                geneSel = topDiffGenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLQQLQ.bp_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLQQLQ.GO.bp, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLQQLQ.bp_result_fisher

DEG_BP.FLQQLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLQQLQ.GO.bp,
                                raw.p.value = DEG.FLQQLQ.bp_result_fisher,
                                topNodes = 50,
                                numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG_BP.FLQQLQ.table, "Results/ByOntology/FLQQLQ_BPTerms.csv")
```

#### MF
```{r mf_DEG_FLQQLQ}
DEgenes.FLQQLQ.GO.mf <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "MF", "FLQQLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "MF",
                allGenes = DEG.genelist.FLQQLQ, # all genes in the "universe" aka our experiment
                geneSel = topDiffGenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLQQLQ.mf_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLQQLQ.GO.mf, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLQQLQ.mf_result_fisher

DEG_MF.FLQQLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLQQLQ.GO.mf, 
                                raw.p.value = DEG.FLQQLQ.mf_result_fisher,
                                topNodes = 50, 
                                numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG_MF.FLQQLQ.table, "Results/ByOntology/FLQQLQ_MFTerms.csv")
```



#### CC
```{r cc_DEG_FLQQLQ}
DEgenes.FLQQLQ.GO.cc <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "CC", "FLQQLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "CC",
                allGenes = DEG.genelist.FLQQLQ, # all genes in the "universe" aka our experiment
                geneSel = topDiffGenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLQQLQ.cc_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLQQLQ.GO.cc, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLQQLQ.cc_result_fisher

DEG_CC.FLQQLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLQQLQ.GO.cc,
                                raw.p.value = DEG.FLQQLQ.cc_result_fisher,
                                topNodes = 50,
                                numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG_CC.FLQQLQ.table, "Results/ByOntology/FLQQLQ_CCTerms.csv")
```

```{r FLQQLQlargetable.DEG_Node=1}
#ALL
DEG_BP.FLQQLQ.table <- cbind(DEG_BP.FLQQLQ.table, ontology=rep("BP", length(DEG_BP.FLQQLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG_MF.FLQQLQ.table <- cbind(DEG_MF.FLQQLQ.table, ontology=rep("MF", length(DEG_MF.FLQQLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG_CC.FLQQLQ.table <- cbind(DEG_CC.FLQQLQ.table, ontology=rep("CC", length(DEG_CC.FLQQLQ.table$GO.ID)))

DEG_GOallontology.FLQQLQ <-rbind(DEG_BP.FLQQLQ.table, DEG_MF.FLQQLQ.table, DEG_CC.FLQQLQ.table)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLQQLQ, "Results/AllGosOntologyCombined/DEGs_GOallontology_FLQQLQ.csv")


#Less than .01
DEG_BP.FLQQLQ.table.01 <- DEG_BP.FLQQLQ.table[DEG_BP.FLQQLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG_MF.FLQQLQ.table.01 <- DEG_MF.FLQQLQ.table[DEG_MF.FLQQLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG_CC.FLQQLQ.table.01 <- DEG_CC.FLQQLQ.table[DEG_CC.FLQQLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]

DEG_GOallontology.FLQQLQ.01 <-rbind(DEG_BP.FLQQLQ.table.01, DEG_MF.FLQQLQ.table.01, DEG_CC.FLQQLQ.table.01)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLQQLQ.01, "Results/DEGs_GOallontology_FLQQLQ.01.csv")
```




### MLQ v QLQ
#### 'Gene' list for DEGs
```{r degsgeneslistMLQQLQ}
DEG.data.MLQQLQ <- read.csv2(file = "../DEG/DEGFullResults/DEGananalysisResults_MLQQLQ.csv", header=TRUE, sep=",")
rownames(DEG.data.MLQQLQ) <- DEG.data.MLQQLQ$X
DEG.data.MLQQLQ <- DEG.data.MLQQLQ[,-1]
```


I discovered that having NAs in the padj is a problem when running the _fisher test via: https://www.biostars.org/p/91474/. Removed the NAs to move forward.
```{r removeNAs_MLQQLQ}
table(is.na(DEG.data.MLQQLQ$padj))
NAlist_MLQQLQ <- which(is.na(DEG.data.MLQQLQ$padj))
rownames(DEG.data.MLQQLQ)[NAlist_MLQQLQ]

#gene list for topgo input
DEG.genelist.MLQQLQ <- as.numeric(DEG.data.MLQQLQ$padj)
names(DEG.genelist.MLQQLQ) <- geneUniverse


##NEED TO REMOVE NAs IN PADJ TO PROCEED
#VERIFY SAME POSITIONS ACROSS ALL PAIRWISE
MLQQLQ_napos <- which(is.na(DEG.genelist.MLQQLQ), arr.ind = TRUE)



#Create a new data frame to use going forward W/O those padj NAs
#This is needed for the _fisher tests
DEG.genelist.MLQQLQ <- DEG.genelist.MLQQLQ[-MLQQLQ_napos]


table(topDiffGenes(DEG.genelist.MLQQLQ))
table(DEG.genelist.MLQQLQ < 0.05)
```


#### BP
```{r BP_DEG_MLQQLQ}
DEgenes.MLQQLQ.GO.bp <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "BP", "MLQQLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "BP",
                allGenes = DEG.genelist.MLQQLQ, # all genes in the "universe" aka our experiment
                geneSel = topDiffGenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.MLQQLQ.bp_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.MLQQLQ.GO.bp, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.MLQQLQ.bp_result_fisher

DEG_BP.MLQQLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.MLQQLQ.GO.bp, 
                                raw.p.value = DEG.MLQQLQ.bp_result_fisher,
                                topNodes = 50,
                                numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG_BP.MLQQLQ.table, "Results/ByOntology/MLQQLQ_BPTerms.csv")
```

#### MF
```{r mf_DEG_MLQQLQ}
DEgenes.MLQQLQ.GO.mf <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "MF", "MLQQLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "MF",
                allGenes = DEG.genelist.MLQQLQ, # all genes in the "universe" aka our experiment
                geneSel = topDiffGenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.MLQQLQ.mf_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.MLQQLQ.GO.mf, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.MLQQLQ.mf_result_fisher

DEG_MF.MLQQLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.MLQQLQ.GO.mf,
                                raw.p.value = DEG.MLQQLQ.mf_result_fisher,
                                topNodes =50,
                                numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG_MF.MLQQLQ.table, "Results/ByOntology/MLQQLQ_MFTerms.csv")
```



#### CC
```{r cc_DEG_MLQQLQ}
DEgenes.MLQQLQ.GO.cc <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "CC", "MLQQLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "CC",
                allGenes = DEG.genelist.MLQQLQ, # all genes in the "universe" aka our experiment
                geneSel = topDiffGenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.MLQQLQ.cc_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.MLQQLQ.GO.cc, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.MLQQLQ.cc_result_fisher

DEG_CC.MLQQLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.MLQQLQ.GO.cc,
                                raw.p.value = DEG.MLQQLQ.cc_result_fisher,
                                topNodes = 50,
                                numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG_CC.MLQQLQ.table, "Results/ByOntology/MLQQLQ_CCTerms.csv")
```

```{r MLQQLQlargetable.DEG_Node=1}
#ALL
DEG_BP.MLQQLQ.table <- cbind(DEG_BP.MLQQLQ.table, ontology=rep("BP", length(DEG_BP.MLQQLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG_MF.MLQQLQ.table <- cbind(DEG_MF.MLQQLQ.table, ontology=rep("MF", length(DEG_MF.MLQQLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG_CC.MLQQLQ.table <- cbind(DEG_CC.MLQQLQ.table, ontology=rep("CC", length(DEG_CC.MLQQLQ.table$GO.ID)))

DEG_GOallontology.MLQQLQ <-rbind(DEG_BP.MLQQLQ.table, DEG_MF.MLQQLQ.table, DEG_CC.MLQQLQ.table)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.MLQQLQ, "Results/AllGosOntologyCombined/DEGs_GOallontology_MLQQLQ.csv")


#Less than .01
DEG_BP.MLQQLQ.table.01 <- DEG_BP.MLQQLQ.table[DEG_BP.MLQQLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG_MF.MLQQLQ.table.01 <- DEG_MF.MLQQLQ.table[DEG_MF.MLQQLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG_CC.MLQQLQ.table.01 <- DEG_CC.MLQQLQ.table[DEG_CC.MLQQLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]

DEG_GOallontology.MLQQLQ.01 <-rbind(DEG_BP.MLQQLQ.table.01, DEG_MF.MLQQLQ.table.01, DEG_CC.MLQQLQ.table.01)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.MLQQLQ.01, "Results/DEGs_GOallontology_MLQQLQ.01.csv")
```




```{r alluniqueGO}
##BP##
# Gather all GO terms across all analyses
all_GOs_BP <- c(DEG_BP.FLWFLQ.table.01$GO.ID, DEG_BP.MLWMLQ.table.01$GO.ID, DEG_BP.QLWQLQ.table.01$GO.ID, DEG_BP.FLWMLW.table.01$GO.ID, DEG_BP.FLQMLQ.table.01$GO.ID, DEG_BP.FLQQLQ.table.01$GO.ID, DEG_BP.MLQQLQ.table.01$GO.ID)

# Save only the unique GO.IDs
# We will pull from this to build df
unique_GO_BP <- unique(all_GOs_BP)

# Make df to store the results using the unique GO IDs.
#All columns will be this length because it is just T/F later
GO_df_BP <- data.frame(GOID = unique_GO_BP)

# List of data frame to check aka the results
#doing this just for P < 0.01
GOlists <- list(
  FLWFLQ = DEG_BP.FLWFLQ.table.01, 
  MLWMLQ = DEG_BP.MLWMLQ.table.01, 
  QLWQLQ = DEG_BP.QLWQLQ.table.01, 
  FLWMLW = DEG_BP.FLWMLW.table.01, 
  FLQMLQ = DEG_BP.FLQMLQ.table.01, 
  FLQQLQ = DEG_BP.FLQQLQ.table.01, 
  MLQQLQ = DEG_BP.MLQQLQ.table.01
)

# Check for each GO.ID in individual dfs from the list of dfs
#return TRUE/FALSE
check_for_GOID <- function(df, id) {
  return(id %in% df$GO.ID)  # Check if GO.ID is present in the current data frame
}

# Loop through each data frame in GOlists and check for each GO.ID
for (df_name in names(GOlists)) {
  # Get the current data frame
  current_df <- GOlists[[df_name]]
  
  # Check if each GO.ID is present in the current data frame and store the result
  GO_df_BP[[df_name]] <- sapply(GO_df_BP$GOID, function(id) check_for_GOID(current_df, id))
}

#Modify the results so that only TRUE is shown
GO_df_BP<- GO_df_BP %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(. == FALSE, "", .)))

print(GO_df_BP)


write.csv(GO_df_BP, "Results/AllResults_fisherp01BP.csv")



##MF##
# Gather all GO terms across all analyses
all_GOs_MF <- c(DEG_MF.FLWFLQ.table.01$GO.ID, DEG_MF.MLWMLQ.table.01$GO.ID, DEG_MF.QLWQLQ.table.01$GO.ID, DEG_MF.FLWMLW.table.01$GO.ID, DEG_MF.FLQMLQ.table.01$GO.ID, DEG_MF.FLQQLQ.table.01$GO.ID, DEG_MF.MLQQLQ.table.01$GO.ID)

# Save only the unique GO.IDs
# We will pull from this to build df
unique_GO_MF <- unique(all_GOs_MF)

# Make df to store the results using the unique GO IDs.
#All columns will be this length because it is just T/F later
GO_df_MF <- data.frame(GOID = unique_GO_MF)

# List of data frame to check aka the results
#doing this just for P < 0.01
GOlists_MF <- list(
  FLWFLQ = DEG_MF.FLWFLQ.table.01, 
  MLWMLQ = DEG_MF.MLWMLQ.table.01, 
  QLWQLQ = DEG_MF.QLWQLQ.table.01, 
  FLWMLW = DEG_MF.FLWMLW.table.01, 
  FLQMLQ = DEG_MF.FLQMLQ.table.01, 
  FLQQLQ = DEG_MF.FLQQLQ.table.01, 
  MLQQLQ = DEG_MF.MLQQLQ.table.01
)


# Loop through each data frame in GOlists and check for each GO.ID
for (df_name in names(GOlists_MF)) {
  # Get the current data frame
  current_df <- GOlists_MF[[df_name]]
  
  # Check if each GO.ID is present in the current data frame and store the result
  GO_df_MF[[df_name]] <- sapply(GO_df_MF$GOID, function(id) check_for_GOID(current_df, id))
}

#Modify the results so that only TRUE is shown
GO_df_MF <- GO_df_MF %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(. == FALSE, "", .)))

print(GO_df_MF)


write.csv(GO_df_MF, "Results/AllResults_fisherp01MF.csv")




##CC##
# Gather all GO terms across all analyses
all_GOs_CC <- c(DEG_CC.FLWFLQ.table.01$GO.ID, DEG_CC.MLWMLQ.table.01$GO.ID, DEG_CC.QLWQLQ.table.01$GO.ID, DEG_CC.FLWMLW.table.01$GO.ID, DEG_CC.FLQMLQ.table.01$GO.ID, DEG_CC.FLQQLQ.table.01$GO.ID, DEG_CC.MLQQLQ.table.01$GO.ID)

# Save only the unique GO.IDs
# We will pull from this to build df
unique_GO_CC <- unique(all_GOs_CC)

# Make df to store the results using the unique GO IDs.
#All columns will be this length because it is just T/F later
GO_df_CC <- data.frame(GOID = unique_GO_CC)

# List of data frame to check aka the results
#doing this just for P < 0.01
GOlists_CC <- list(
  FLWFLQ = DEG_CC.FLWFLQ.table.01, 
  MLWMLQ = DEG_CC.MLWMLQ.table.01, 
  QLWQLQ = DEG_CC.QLWQLQ.table.01, 
  FLWMLW = DEG_CC.FLWMLW.table.01, 
  FLQMLQ = DEG_CC.FLQMLQ.table.01, 
  FLQQLQ = DEG_CC.FLQQLQ.table.01, 
  MLQQLQ = DEG_CC.MLQQLQ.table.01
)


# Loop through each data frame in GOlists and check for each GO.ID
for (df_name in names(GOlists_CC)) {
  # Get the current data frame
  current_df <- GOlists_CC[[df_name]]
  
  # Check if each GO.ID is present in the current data frame and store the result
  GO_df_CC[[df_name]] <- sapply(GO_df_CC$GOID, function(id) check_for_GOID(current_df, id))
}

#Modify the results so that only TRUE is shown
GO_df_CC <- GO_df_CC %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(. == FALSE, "", .)))

print(GO_df_CC)


write.csv(GO_df_CC, "Results/AllResults_fisherp01CC.csv")
write_xlsx(list(BP=GO_df_BP, MF=GO_df_MF, CC=GO_df_CC), path = "Results/AllAnalyses_truesetup.xlsx", col_names = TRUE)


# library(xlsx)
# if(Sys.getenv("JAVA_HOME")!=""){
#     Sys.setenv(JAVA_HOME="")
# }
# library(rJava)
# write.xlsx(DEG_BP.FLWFLQ.table.01, file="Results/AllAnalyses.csv", sheetName="sheet1", row.names=FALSE)
# write.xlsx(DEG_BP.MLWMLQ.table.01, file="Results/AllAnalyses.csv", sheetName="sheet2", append=TRUE, row.names=FALSE)
# write.xlsx(DEG_BP.QLWQLQ.table.01, file="Results/AllAnalyses.csv", sheetName="sheet3", append=TRUE, row.names=FALSE)
# write.xlsx(DEG_BP.FLWMLW.table.01, file="Results/AllAnalyses.csv", sheetName="sheet4", append=TRUE, row.names=FALSE)
# write.xlsx(DEG_BP.FLQMLQ.table.01, file="Results/AllAnalyses.csv", sheetName="sheet5", append=TRUE, row.names=FALSE)
# write.xlsx(DEG_BP.FLQQLQ.table.01, file="Results/AllAnalyses.csv", sheetName="sheet6", append=TRUE, row.names=FALSE)
# write.xlsx(DEG_BP.MLQQLQ.table.01, file="Results/AllAnalyses.csv", sheetName="sheet7", append=TRUE, row.names=FALSE)

library(writexl)

GOlists_AllOntology <- list(
  FLWFLQ = DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.01, 
  MLWMLQ = DEG_GOallontology.MLWMLQ.01, 
  QLWQLQ = DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ.01, 
  FLWMLW = DEG_GOallontology.FLWMLW.01, 
  FLQMLQ = DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.01, 
  FLQQLQ = DEG_GOallontology.FLQQLQ.01, 
  MLQQLQ = DEG_GOallontology.MLQQLQ.01
)

write_xlsx(GOlists_AllOntology, path = "Results/AllAnalyses.xlsx", col_names = TRUE)

```


```{r adddefs}
FULLtermsandDefs <- read.csv2(file = "../GSEA/combineGO.csv", header=TRUE, sep=",")

term_def <- FULLtermsandDefs[,c("GO", "term", "definition")]

term_def2 <- unique(term_def, by = "GO")
colnames(term_def2)[1] <- c("GO.ID")



DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.01_mergetermdef <- merge(DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.01, term_def2, by = "GO.ID", all.x = TRUE)
DEG_GOallontology.MLWMLQ.01_mergetermdef <- merge(DEG_GOallontology.MLWMLQ.01, term_def2, by = "GO.ID", all.x = TRUE)
DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ.01_mergetermdef <- merge(DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ.01, term_def2, by = "GO.ID", all.x = TRUE)
DEG_GOallontology.FLWMLW.01_mergetermdef <- merge(DEG_GOallontology.FLWMLW.01, term_def2, by = "GO.ID", all.x = TRUE)
DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.01_mergetermdef <- merge(DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.01, term_def2, by = "GO.ID", all.x = TRUE)
DEG_GOallontology.FLQQLQ.01_mergetermdef <- merge(DEG_GOallontology.FLQQLQ.01, term_def2, by = "GO.ID", all.x = TRUE)
DEG_GOallontology.MLQQLQ.01_mergetermdef <- merge(DEG_GOallontology.MLQQLQ.01, term_def2, by = "GO.ID", all.x = TRUE)

#verifying terms match
table(DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.01_mergetermdef$Term==DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.01_mergetermdef$term)
table(DEG_GOallontology.MLWMLQ.01_mergetermdef$Term==DEG_GOallontology.MLWMLQ.01_mergetermdef$term)
table(DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ.01_mergetermdef$Term==DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ.01_mergetermdef$term)
table(DEG_GOallontology.FLWMLW.01_mergetermdef$Term==DEG_GOallontology.FLWMLW.01_mergetermdef$term)
table(DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.01_mergetermdef$Term==DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.01_mergetermdef$term)
table(DEG_GOallontology.FLQQLQ.01_mergetermdef$Term==DEG_GOallontology.FLQQLQ.01_mergetermdef$term)
#one false
#False is 31; MAH verified and it is okay
table(DEG_GOallontology.MLQQLQ.01_mergetermdef$Term==DEG_GOallontology.MLQQLQ.01_mergetermdef$term)


#All Terms=terms; removing "terms" column
DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.01_mergetermdef <- DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.01_mergetermdef[,-8]
DEG_GOallontology.MLWMLQ.01_mergetermdef <- DEG_GOallontology.MLWMLQ.01_mergetermdef[,-8]
DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ.01_mergetermdef <- DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ.01_mergetermdef[,-8]
DEG_GOallontology.FLWMLW.01_mergetermdef <- DEG_GOallontology.FLWMLW.01_mergetermdef[,-8]
DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.01_mergetermdef <- DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.01_mergetermdef[,-8]
DEG_GOallontology.FLQQLQ.01_mergetermdef <- DEG_GOallontology.FLQQLQ.01_mergetermdef[,-8]
DEG_GOallontology.MLQQLQ.01_mergetermdef <- DEG_GOallontology.MLQQLQ.01_mergetermdef[,-8]

#Gsub the < symbols from these when present so I can save as numeric and sort
DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.01_mergetermdef$raw.p.value <- gsub("< ", "", DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.01_mergetermdef$raw.p.value)
DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.01_mergetermdef$raw.p.value <- gsub("< ", "", DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.01_mergetermdef$raw.p.value)
DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.01_mergetermdef$raw.p.value <- gsub("<", "", DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.01_mergetermdef$raw.p.value)



#make sure P is numeric
#All Terms=terms; removing "terms" column

as.numeric(DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.01_mergetermdef$raw.p.value)
as.numeric(DEG_GOallontology.MLWMLQ.01_mergetermdef$raw.p.value)
as.numeric(DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ.01_mergetermdef$raw.p.value)
as.numeric(DEG_GOallontology.FLWMLW.01_mergetermdef$raw.p.value)
as.numeric(DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.01_mergetermdef$raw.p.value)
as.numeric(DEG_GOallontology.FLQQLQ.01_mergetermdef$raw.p.value)
as.numeric(DEG_GOallontology.MLQQLQ.01_mergetermdef$raw.p.value)


#order by group and then ascending pvalue
# those in sci not will be at the bottom
DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.01_mergetermdef <- DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.01_mergetermdef %>%
  arrange(ontology, raw.p.value) 
DEG_GOallontology.MLWMLQ.01_mergetermdef <- DEG_GOallontology.MLWMLQ.01_mergetermdef %>%
  arrange(ontology, raw.p.value)
DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ.01_mergetermdef <- DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ.01_mergetermdef %>%
  arrange(ontology, raw.p.value) 
DEG_GOallontology.FLWMLW.01_mergetermdef <- DEG_GOallontology.FLWMLW.01_mergetermdef %>%
  arrange(ontology, raw.p.value)
DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.01_mergetermdef <- DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.01_mergetermdef %>%
  arrange(ontology, raw.p.value) 
DEG_GOallontology.FLQQLQ.01_mergetermdef <- DEG_GOallontology.FLQQLQ.01_mergetermdef %>%
  arrange(ontology, raw.p.value) 
DEG_GOallontology.MLQQLQ.01_mergetermdef <- DEG_GOallontology.MLQQLQ.01_mergetermdef %>%
  arrange(ontology, raw.p.value)


#write them all to CSV
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.01_mergetermdef, "Results/TermsDefs/FLWFLQ_fisher1_TD.csv")
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.MLWMLQ.01_mergetermdef, "Results/TermsDefs/FLWFLQ_fisher1_TD.csv")
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ.01_mergetermdef, "Results/TermsDefs/FLWFLQ_fisher1_TD.csv")
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLWMLW.01_mergetermdef, "Results/TermsDefs/FLWFLQ_fisher1_TD.csv")
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.01_mergetermdef, "Results/TermsDefs/FLWFLQ_fisher1_TD.csv")
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLQQLQ.01_mergetermdef, "Results/TermsDefs/FLWFLQ_fisher1_TD.csv")
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.MLQQLQ.01_mergetermdef, "Results/TermsDefs/FLWFLQ_fisher1_TD.csv")


GOlists_AllOntology_TD <- list(
  FLWFLQ = DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.01_mergetermdef, 
  MLWMLQ = DEG_GOallontology.MLWMLQ.01_mergetermdef, 
  QLWQLQ = DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ.01_mergetermdef, 
  FLWMLW = DEG_GOallontology.FLWMLW.01_mergetermdef, 
  FLQMLQ = DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.01_mergetermdef, 
  FLQQLQ = DEG_GOallontology.FLQQLQ.01_mergetermdef, 
  MLQQLQ = DEG_GOallontology.MLQQLQ.01_mergetermdef
)


write_xlsx(GOlists_AllOntology_TD, path = "Results/AllAnalyses_TDincluded.xlsx", col_names = TRUE)

```


```{r saveTOPgodata}
save(DEgenes.FLWFLQ.GO.bp, DEgenes.FLWFLQ.GO.mf, DEgenes.FLWFLQ.GO.cc, DEgenes.MLWMLQ.GO.bp, DEgenes.MLWMLQ.GO.mf, DEgenes.MLWMLQ.GO.cc, DEgenes.QLWQLQ.GO.bp, DEgenes.QLWQLQ.GO.mf, DEgenes.QLWQLQ.GO.cc, DEgenes.FLWMLW.GO.bp, DEgenes.FLWMLW.GO.mf, DEgenes.FLWMLW.GO.cc, DEgenes.FLQMLQ.GO.bp, DEgenes.FLQMLQ.GO.mf, DEgenes.FLQMLQ.GO.cc, DEgenes.FLQQLQ.GO.bp, DEgenes.FLQQLQ.GO.mf, DEgenes.FLQQLQ.GO.cc, DEgenes.MLQQLQ.GO.bp, DEgenes.MLQQLQ.GO.mf, DEgenes.MLQQLQ.GO.cc, file = "Results/GeneTables/TopGOobjects.Rdata")


```








# Rerun using upregulated and downregulate DEGs
In this analysis, we want to separate out DEGs into upregulated and downregulated groups prior to running the geneset enrichment analyses.

## Log Fold Change Scores
```{r upregulatedsplit}
##no DEGs up for FLWMLW, FLWQLW, MLQQLW, MLQQLQ


#FLWFLQ
sig.FLWFLQ <- subset(DEG.data.FLWFLQ, DEG.data.FLWFLQ$significant=="Significant")
str(sig.FLWFLQ)
  ##Make numeric
  sig.FLWFLQ[ , 1:6] <- lapply(sig.FLWFLQ[ , 1:6], as.numeric)
DEgenes_UP.FLWFLQ <- rownames(sig.FLWFLQ[sig.FLWFLQ$log2FoldChange > 1.5,])


######DEgenes_LFC.FLWFLQ <- rownames(sig.FLWFLQ[sig.FLWFLQ$log2FoldChange > 1.5,])



#these will be the same moving forward; so making numeric

#MLWMLQ
sig.MLWMLQ <- subset(DEG.data.MLWMLQ, DEG.data.MLWMLQ$significant=="Significant")
  ##Make numeric
  sig.MLWMLQ[ , 1:6] <- lapply(sig.MLWMLQ[ , 1:6], as.numeric)
DEgenes_UP.MLWMLQ <- rownames(sig.MLWMLQ[sig.MLWMLQ$log2FoldChange > 1.5,])

#QLWQLQ
sig.QLWQLQ <- subset(DEG.data.QLWQLQ, DEG.data.QLWQLQ$significant=="Significant")
  ##Make numeric
  sig.QLWQLQ[ , 1:6] <- lapply(sig.QLWQLQ[ , 1:6], as.numeric)
DEgenes_UP.QLWQLQ <- rownames(sig.QLWQLQ[sig.QLWQLQ$log2FoldChange > 1.5,])


#FLQMLQ
sig.FLQMLQ <- subset(DEG.data.FLQMLQ, DEG.data.FLQMLQ$significant=="Significant")
  ##Make numeric
  sig.FLQMLQ[ , 1:6] <- lapply(sig.FLQMLQ[ , 1:6], as.numeric)
DEgenes_UP.FLQMLQ <- rownames(sig.FLQMLQ[sig.FLQMLQ$log2FoldChange > 1.5,])



#FLQQLQ
sig.FLQQLQ <- subset(DEG.data.FLQQLQ, DEG.data.FLQQLQ$significant=="Significant")
  ##Make numeric
  sig.FLQQLQ[ , 1:6] <- lapply(sig.FLQQLQ[ , 1:6], as.numeric)
DEgenes_UP.FLQQLQ <- rownames(sig.FLQQLQ[sig.FLQQLQ$log2FoldChange > 1.5,])

```


## Downregulated genes only
```{r downregulatedsplit}
##no DEGs up for FLWQLW, MLQQLW, MLQQLQ  
#MLQQLQ only has 1 downregulated gene, so not running a go on that.


#FLWFLQ
DEgenes_DOWN.FLWFLQ <- rownames(sig.FLWFLQ[sig.FLWFLQ$log2FoldChange < -1.5,])

#MLWMLQ
DEgenes_DOWN.MLWMLQ <- rownames(sig.MLWMLQ[sig.MLWMLQ$log2FoldChange < -1.5,])

#QLWQLQ
DEgenes_DOWN.QLWQLQ <- rownames(sig.QLWQLQ[sig.QLWQLQ$log2FoldChange < -1.5,])

#FLQMLQ
DEgenes_DOWN.FLQMLQ <- rownames(sig.FLQMLQ[sig.FLQMLQ$log2FoldChange < -1.5,])

#FLQQLQ
DEgenes_DOWN.FLQQLQ <- rownames(sig.FLQQLQ[sig.FLQQLQ$log2FoldChange < -1.5,])


#FLWMLW
sig.FLWMLW <- subset(DEG.data.FLWMLW, DEG.data.FLWMLW$significant=="Significant")
  ##Make numeric
  sig.FLWMLW[ , 1:6] <- lapply(sig.FLWMLW[ , 1:6], as.numeric)
DEgenes_DOWN.FLWMLW <- rownames(sig.FLWMLW[sig.FLWMLW$log2FoldChange < -1.5,])

```


### FLWFLQ
#### Upregulated
#### BP
```{r BP_DEG_FLWFLQ_up}
GeneList_FLWFLQ_up <- as.integer(geneUniverse %in% DEgenes_UP.FLWFLQ)
names(GeneList_FLWFLQ_up) <- geneUniverse
LFCgenes <- function(x) x == 1

#verifying number of upreg genes with LFC < 1.5
table(GeneList_FLWFLQ_up)
#verifying the function
table(LFCgenes(GeneList_FLWFLQ_up))


DEgenes.FLWFLQ_UP.GO.bp <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEGUpGo", "BP", "FLWFLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "BP",
                # all upregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_FLWFLQ_up, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Run enrichment test using Fisher's exact test
DEG.FLWFLQ_UP.bp_result_Fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLWFLQ_UP.GO.bp, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLWFLQ_UP.bp_result_Fisher

DEG.UP_BP.FLWFLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLWFLQ_UP.GO.bp, 
                                   raw.p.value = DEG.FLWFLQ_UP.bp_result_Fisher, 
                                   topNodes = 50, 
                                   numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.UP_BP.FLWFLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/UP/byontology/FLWFLQ_UP_BPTerms.csv")
```




#### MF
```{r mf_DEG_FLWFLQ_up}
DEgenes.FLWFLQ_UP.GO.mf <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "MF", "FLWFLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "MF",
                # all upregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_FLWFLQ_up, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLWFLQ_UP.mf_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLWFLQ_UP.GO.mf, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLWFLQ_UP.mf_result_fisher

DEG.UP_MF.FLWFLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLWFLQ_UP.GO.mf, 
                                   raw.p.value = DEG.FLWFLQ_UP.mf_result_fisher, 
                                   topNodes = 50, 
                                   numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.UP_MF.FLWFLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/UP/byontology/FLWFLQ_UP_MFTerms.csv")
```



#### CC
```{r cc_DEG_FLWFLQ_up}
DEgenes.FLWFLQ_UP.GO.cc <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "CC", "FLWFLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "CC",
                # all upregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_FLWFLQ_up, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLWFLQ_UP.cc_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLWFLQ_UP.GO.cc, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLWFLQ_UP.cc_result_fisher

DEG.UP_CC.FLWFLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLWFLQ_UP.GO.cc, 
                                   raw.p.value = DEG.FLWFLQ_UP.cc_result_fisher, 
                                   topNodes = 50, 
                                   numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.UP_CC.FLWFLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/UP/byontology/FLWFLQ_UP_CCTerms.csv")
```

```{r FLWFLQlargetable.UP}
#ALL
DEG.UP_BP.FLWFLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.UP_BP.FLWFLQ.table, ontology=rep("BP", length(DEG.UP_BP.FLWFLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG.UP_MF.FLWFLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.UP_MF.FLWFLQ.table, ontology=rep("MF", length(DEG.UP_MF.FLWFLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG.UP_CC.FLWFLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.UP_CC.FLWFLQ.table, ontology=rep("CC", length(DEG.UP_CC.FLWFLQ.table$GO.ID)))

DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.UPregulated <-rbind(DEG.UP_BP.FLWFLQ.table, DEG.UP_MF.FLWFLQ.table, DEG.UP_CC.FLWFLQ.table)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.UPregulated, "Results/UpDownSplit/UP/ALL/DEGs_GOallontology_FLWFLQ_upregulated.csv")


#Less than .01
DEG.UP_BP.FLWFLQ.table.01 <- DEG.UP_BP.FLWFLQ.table[DEG.UP_BP.FLWFLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG.UP_MF.FLWFLQ.table.01 <- DEG.UP_MF.FLWFLQ.table[DEG.UP_MF.FLWFLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG.UP_CC.FLWFLQ.table.01 <- DEG.UP_CC.FLWFLQ.table[DEG.UP_CC.FLWFLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]

DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.UPregulated.01 <-rbind(DEG.UP_BP.FLWFLQ.table.01, DEG.UP_MF.FLWFLQ.table.01, DEG.UP_CC.FLWFLQ.table.01)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.UPregulated.01, "Results/UpDownSplit/point1percent/DEGs_GOallontology_FLWFLQ_upregulated.01.csv")
```


#### Downregulated
#### BP
```{r BP_DEG_FLWFLQ_down}
GeneList_FLWFLQ_down <- as.integer(geneUniverse %in% DEgenes_DOWN.FLWFLQ)
names(GeneList_FLWFLQ_down) <- geneUniverse

#verifying number of upreg genes with LFC < -1.5
table(GeneList_FLWFLQ_down)
#verifying the function
table(LFCgenes(GeneList_FLWFLQ_down))

DEgenes.FLWFLQ_DOWN.GO.bp <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEGDownGo", "BP", "FLWFLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "BP",
                # all downregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_FLWFLQ_down, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLWFLQ_DOWN.bp_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLWFLQ_DOWN.GO.bp, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLWFLQ_DOWN.bp_result_fisher

DEG.DOWN_BP.FLWFLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLWFLQ_DOWN.GO.bp, 
                                     raw.p.value = DEG.FLWFLQ_DOWN.bp_result_fisher, 
                                     topNodes = 50,
                                     numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.DOWN_BP.FLWFLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/DOWN/byontology/FLWFLQ_DOWN_BPTerms.csv")
```


#### MF
```{r mf_DEG_FLWFLQ_down}
DEgenes.FLWFLQ_DOWN.GO.mf <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "MF", "FLWFLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "MF",
                # all downregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_FLWFLQ_down, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLWFLQ_DOWN.mf_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLWFLQ_DOWN.GO.mf, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLWFLQ_DOWN.mf_result_fisher

DEG.DOWN_MF.FLWFLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLWFLQ_DOWN.GO.mf, 
                                     raw.p.value = DEG.FLWFLQ_DOWN.mf_result_fisher, 
                                     topNodes = 50, 
                                     numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.DOWN_MF.FLWFLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/DOWN/byontology/FLWFLQ_DOWN_MFTerms.csv")
```



#### CC
```{r cc_DEG_FLWFLQ_down}
DEgenes.FLWFLQ_DOWN.GO.cc <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "CC", "FLWFLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "CC",
                # all downregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_FLWFLQ_down, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLWFLQ_DOWN.cc_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLWFLQ_DOWN.GO.cc, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLWFLQ_DOWN.cc_result_fisher

DEG.DOWN_CC.FLWFLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLWFLQ_DOWN.GO.cc, 
                                     raw.p.value = DEG.FLWFLQ_DOWN.cc_result_fisher, 
                                     topNodes = 50,
                                     numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.DOWN_CC.FLWFLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/DOWN/byontology/FLWFLQ_DOWN_CCTerms.csv")
```

```{r FLWFLQlargetable.DOWN}
#ALL
DEG.DOWN_BP.FLWFLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.DOWN_BP.FLWFLQ.table, ontology=rep("BP", length(DEG.DOWN_BP.FLWFLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG.DOWN_MF.FLWFLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.DOWN_MF.FLWFLQ.table, ontology=rep("MF", length(DEG.DOWN_MF.FLWFLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG.DOWN_CC.FLWFLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.DOWN_CC.FLWFLQ.table, ontology=rep("CC", length(DEG.DOWN_CC.FLWFLQ.table$GO.ID)))

DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.DOWNregulated <-rbind(DEG.DOWN_BP.FLWFLQ.table, DEG.DOWN_MF.FLWFLQ.table, DEG.DOWN_CC.FLWFLQ.table)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.DOWNregulated, "Results/UpDownSplit/DOWN/ALL/DEGs_GOallontology_FLWFLQ_downregulated.csv")


#Less than .01
DEG.DOWN_BP.FLWFLQ.table.01 <- DEG.DOWN_BP.FLWFLQ.table[DEG.DOWN_BP.FLWFLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG.DOWN_MF.FLWFLQ.table.01 <- DEG.DOWN_MF.FLWFLQ.table[DEG.DOWN_MF.FLWFLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG.DOWN_CC.FLWFLQ.table.01 <- DEG.DOWN_CC.FLWFLQ.table[DEG.DOWN_CC.FLWFLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]

DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.DOWNregulated.01 <-rbind(DEG.DOWN_BP.FLWFLQ.table.01, DEG.DOWN_MF.FLWFLQ.table.01, DEG.DOWN_CC.FLWFLQ.table.01)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.DOWNregulated.01, "Results/UpDownSplit/point1percent/DEGs_GOallontology_FLWFLQ_downregulated.01.csv")
```



```{r extractgenesforGOs.FLWFLQ}
#get results table
results.FLWFLQ <- list(BP.ALL = DEG_BP.FLWFLQ.table,
  BP.UP = DEG.UP_BP.FLWFLQ.table, 
  BP.DOWN = DEG.DOWN_BP.FLWFLQ.table,
  MF.ALL = DEG_MF.FLWFLQ.table,
  MF.UP = DEG.UP_MF.FLWFLQ.table, 
  MF.DOWN = DEG.DOWN_MF.FLWFLQ.table,
  CC.ALL = DEG_CC.FLWFLQ.table,
  CC.UP = DEG.UP_CC.FLWFLQ.table, 
  CC.DOWN = DEG.DOWN_CC.FLWFLQ.table
)
  
#get a list of the godata objects
GOdata_list.FLWFLQ <- list(
  BP.ALL = DEgenes.FLWFLQ.GO.bp,
  BP.UP = DEgenes.FLWFLQ_UP.GO.bp, 
  BP.DOWN = DEgenes.FLWFLQ_DOWN.GO.bp,
  MF.ALL = DEgenes.FLWFLQ.GO.mf,
  MF.UP = DEgenes.FLWFLQ_UP.GO.mf, 
  MF.DOWN = DEgenes.FLWFLQ_DOWN.GO.mf,
  CC.ALL = DEgenes.FLWFLQ.GO.cc,
  CC.UP = DEgenes.FLWFLQ_UP.GO.cc, 
  CC.DOWN = DEgenes.FLWFLQ_DOWN.GO.cc
)

#geneID Extraction

# Step 1: Filter significant GO terms (p < 0.01), handling scientific notation
sig.terms_list.FLWFLQ <- lapply(results.FLWFLQ, function(tbl) {
    # Ensure p-values are numeric (handles cases where they are character strings like "1.2e-5")
    pvals <- as.numeric(tbl$raw.p.value)
    
    # Return GO.IDs with p < 0.01
    tbl$GO.ID[which(pvals < 0.01)]
})

# Step 2: Extract significant genes per GO term from each GOdata object
significant_genes_per_GO.FLWFLQ <- mapply(function(GOdata, go_ids) {
    # Get genes associated with each GO term
    genes_per_GO <- genesInTerm(object = GOdata, whichGO = go_ids)
    # Get significant genes from the GOdata object
    sigGenesSet <- sigGenes(GOdata)
    # Intersect genes in each GO term with the significant genes
    lapply(genes_per_GO, function(genes) intersect(genes, sigGenesSet))
  },
GOdata_list.FLWFLQ,
sig.terms_list.FLWFLQ,
SIMPLIFY = FALSE)


# #flatten that B
# # Flatten the nested list into a tidy data frame
# df_significant_genes_per_GO <- map2_df(
#   significant_genes_per_GO,
#   names(significant_genes_per_GO),  # Corresponds to BP.ALL, BP.UP, BP.DOWN
#   function(go_list, group_name) {
#     tibble(
#       GO.ID = names(go_list),
#       significant_genes = go_list,
#       group = group_name
#     ) %>%
#     unnest_longer(significant_genes)  # Expands each gene to its own row
#   }
# )
# 
# 
# 
# write_xlsx(df_significant_genes_per_GO, "Results/GenesPerGO/significant_genes_per_GO_FLWFLQ.BP.xlsx")




#plus terms
# Make a named vector of GO terms (Term names), per group
go_term_names_list.FLWFLQ <- lapply(results.FLWFLQ, function(tbl) {
  setNames(tbl$Term, tbl$GO.ID)
})

# tidy_gene_tables <- map2(
#   significant_genes_per_GO,
#   names(significant_genes_per_GO),
#   function(go_list, group_name) {
#     # Create base table with GO.ID and genes
#     df <- tibble(
#       GO.ID = names(go_list),
#       significant_genes = go_list
#     ) %>%
#     unnest_longer(significant_genes)
# 
#     # Add GO term names using the appropriate lookup table
#     df$Term <- go_term_names_list[[group_name]][df$GO.ID]
# 
#     # Add group label
#     df$Group <- group_name
# 
#     # Reorder columns using base R or dplyr
#     df <- df[, c("Group", "GO.ID", "Term", "significant_genes")]  # <- fixed here
# 
#     return(df)
#   }
# )





####This is the function that will be used across PW comparisons

write_sig_genes_per_GO_to_excel <- function(sig_gene_list, go_term_name_list, output_file) {
  
  # Build a list of tidy data frames (one per group/sheet)
  tidy_gene_tables <- purrr::map2(
    sig_gene_list,
    names(sig_gene_list),
    function(go_list, group_name) {
      # Create base table with GO.ID and genes
      df <- tibble(
        GO.ID = names(go_list),
        significant_genes = go_list
      ) %>%
      unnest_longer(significant_genes)
      
      # Add GO term names from lookup
      df$Term <- go_term_name_list[[group_name]][df$GO.ID]
      
      # Add group and ontology type
      df$Group <- group_name
      df$Ontology <- toupper(stringr::str_extract(group_name, "^[A-Za-z]+"))  # Extract BP, MF, CC

      # Reorder columns
      df <- df[, c("Ontology", "Group", "GO.ID", "Term", "significant_genes")]
      
      return(df)
    }
  )
  
  # Create Excel workbook
  wb <- createWorkbook()
  
  # Add a sheet for each group
  purrr::walk2(tidy_gene_tables, names(tidy_gene_tables), function(df, sheet_name) {
    addWorksheet(wb, sheet_name)
    writeData(wb, sheet = sheet_name, df)
  })
  
  # Save workbook
  saveWorkbook(wb, output_file, overwrite = TRUE)
}


write_sig_genes_per_GO_to_excel(
  sig_gene_list = significant_genes_per_GO.FLWFLQ,
  go_term_name_list = go_term_names_list.FLWFLQ,
  output_file = "Results/GenesPerGO/FLWFLQ_significant_genes_per_GO.xlsx"
)



#Verify the overlap of genes between all, up, down
#BP
genesFLWFLQ_BP_ALL <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLWFLQ$BP.ALL))
genesFLWFLQ_BP_UP <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLWFLQ$BP.UP))
genesFLWFLQ_BP_DOWN <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLWFLQ$BP.DOWN))

  #OVERLAP
  intersect(genesFLWFLQ_BP_ALL, genesFLWFLQ_BP_UP)
  table(genesFLWFLQ_BP_UP %in% genesFLWFLQ_BP_ALL)
  table(genesFLWFLQ_BP_UP %in% names(DEG.genelist.FLWFLQ))
  
  intersect(genesFLWFLQ_BP_ALL, genesFLWFLQ_BP_DOWN)
  table(genesFLWFLQ_BP_DOWN %in% genesFLWFLQ_BP_ALL)
  table(genesFLWFLQ_BP_DOWN %in% names(DEG.genelist.FLWFLQ))



#MF
genesFLWFLQ_MF_ALL <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLWFLQ$MF.ALL))
genesFLWFLQ_MF_UP <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLWFLQ$MF.UP)) #no ups
genesFLWFLQ_MF_DOWN <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLWFLQ$MF.DOWN))

  #OVERLAP
  intersect(genesFLWFLQ_MF_ALL, genesFLWFLQ_MF_UP)
  table(genesFLWFLQ_MF_UP %in% genesFLWFLQ_MF_ALL)
  table(genesFLWFLQ_MF_UP %in% names(DEG.genelist.FLWFLQ))
  
  intersect(genesFLWFLQ_MF_ALL, genesFLWFLQ_MF_DOWN)
  table(genesFLWFLQ_MF_DOWN %in% genesFLWFLQ_MF_ALL)
  table(genesFLWFLQ_MF_DOWN %in% names(DEG.genelist.FLWFLQ))



#CC
genesFLWFLQ_CC_ALL <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLWFLQ$CC.ALL))
genesFLWFLQ_CC_UP <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLWFLQ$CC.UP))
genesFLWFLQ_CC_DOWN <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLWFLQ$CC.DOWN))


  #OVERLAP
  intersect(genesFLWFLQ_CC_ALL, genesFLWFLQ_CC_UP)
  table(genesFLWFLQ_CC_UP %in% genesFLWFLQ_CC_ALL)
  table(genesFLWFLQ_CC_UP %in% names(DEG.genelist.FLWFLQ))
  
  intersect(genesFLWFLQ_CC_ALL, genesFLWFLQ_CC_DOWN)
  table(genesFLWFLQ_CC_DOWN %in% genesFLWFLQ_CC_ALL)
  table(genesFLWFLQ_CC_DOWN %in% names(DEG.genelist.FLWFLQ))


```



### MLWMLQ
#### Upregulated

#### BP
```{r BP_DEG_MLWMLQ_up}
GeneList_MLWMLQ_up <- as.integer(geneUniverse %in% DEgenes_UP.MLWMLQ)
names(GeneList_MLWMLQ_up) <- geneUniverse
LFCgenes <- function(x) x == 1

#verifying number of upreg genes with LFC < 1.5
table(GeneList_MLWMLQ_up)
#verifying the function
table(LFCgenes(GeneList_MLWMLQ_up))


DEgenes.MLWMLQ_UP.GO.bp <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEGUpGo", "BP", "MLWMLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "BP",
                # all upregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_MLWMLQ_up, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Run enrichment test using Fisher's exact test
DEG.MLWMLQ_UP.bp_result_Fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.MLWMLQ_UP.GO.bp, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.MLWMLQ_UP.bp_result_Fisher

DEG.UP_BP.MLWMLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.MLWMLQ_UP.GO.bp, 
                                   raw.p.value = DEG.MLWMLQ_UP.bp_result_Fisher, 
                                   topNodes = 50, 
                                   numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.UP_BP.MLWMLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/UP/byontology/MLWMLQ_UP_BPTerms.csv")
```




#### MF
```{r mf_DEG_MLWMLQ_up}
DEgenes.MLWMLQ_UP.GO.mf <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "MF", "MLWMLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "MF",
                # all upregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_MLWMLQ_up, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.MLWMLQ_UP.mf_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.MLWMLQ_UP.GO.mf, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.MLWMLQ_UP.mf_result_fisher

DEG.UP_MF.MLWMLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.MLWMLQ_UP.GO.mf, 
                                   raw.p.value = DEG.MLWMLQ_UP.mf_result_fisher, 
                                   topNodes = 50, 
                                   numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.UP_MF.MLWMLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/UP/byontology/MLWMLQ_UP_MFTerms.csv")
```

                description = paste("DEG Go", "CC", "MLWMLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "CC",
                # all upregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_MLWMLQ_up, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.MLWMLQ_UP.cc_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.MLWMLQ_UP.GO.cc, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.MLWMLQ_UP.cc_result_fisher

DEG.UP_CC.MLWMLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.MLWMLQ_UP.GO.cc, 
                                   raw.p.value = DEG.MLWMLQ_UP.cc_result_fisher, 
                                   topNodes = 50, 
                                   numChar = 120)

```{r MLWMLQlargetable.UP}
#ALL
DEG.UP_BP.MLWMLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.UP_BP.MLWMLQ.table, ontology=rep("BP", length(DEG.UP_BP.MLWMLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG.UP_MF.MLWMLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.UP_MF.MLWMLQ.table, ontology=rep("MF", length(DEG.UP_MF.MLWMLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG.UP_CC.MLWMLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.UP_CC.MLWMLQ.table, ontology=rep("CC", length(DEG.UP_CC.MLWMLQ.table$GO.ID)))

DEG_GOallontology.MLWMLQ.UPregulated <-rbind(DEG.UP_BP.MLWMLQ.table, DEG.UP_MF.MLWMLQ.table, DEG.UP_CC.MLWMLQ.table)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.MLWMLQ.UPregulated, "Results/UpDownSplit/UP/ALL/DEGs_GOallontology_MLWMLQ_upregulated.csv")


#Less than .01
DEG.UP_BP.MLWMLQ.table.01 <- DEG.UP_BP.MLWMLQ.table[DEG.UP_BP.MLWMLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG.UP_MF.MLWMLQ.table.01 <- DEG.UP_MF.MLWMLQ.table[DEG.UP_MF.MLWMLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG.UP_CC.MLWMLQ.table.01 <- DEG.UP_CC.MLWMLQ.table[DEG.UP_CC.MLWMLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]

DEG_GOallontology.MLWMLQ.UPregulated.01 <-rbind(DEG.UP_BP.MLWMLQ.table.01, DEG.UP_MF.MLWMLQ.table.01, DEG.UP_CC.MLWMLQ.table.01)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.MLWMLQ.UPregulated.01, "Results/UpDownSplit/point1percent/DEGs_GOallontology_MLWMLQ_upregulated.01.csv")
```


#### Downregulated
#### BP
```{r BP_DEG_MLWMLQ_down}
GeneList_MLWMLQ_down <- as.integer(geneUniverse %in% DEgenes_DOWN.MLWMLQ)
names(GeneList_MLWMLQ_down) <- geneUniverse

#verifying number of upreg genes with LFC < -1.5
table(GeneList_MLWMLQ_down)
#verifying the function
table(LFCgenes(GeneList_MLWMLQ_down))

DEgenes.MLWMLQ_DOWN.GO.bp <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEGDownGo", "BP", "MLWMLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "BP",
                # all downregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_MLWMLQ_down, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.MLWMLQ_DOWN.bp_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.MLWMLQ_DOWN.GO.bp, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.MLWMLQ_DOWN.bp_result_fisher

DEG.DOWN_BP.MLWMLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.MLWMLQ_DOWN.GO.bp, 
                                     raw.p.value = DEG.MLWMLQ_DOWN.bp_result_fisher, 
                                     topNodes = 50,
                                     numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.DOWN_BP.MLWMLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/DOWN/byontology/MLWMLQ_DOWN_BPTerms.csv")
```

DEG.DOWN_MF.MLWMLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.DOWN_MF.MLWMLQ.table, ontology=rep("MF", length(DEG.DOWN_MF.MLWMLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG.DOWN_CC.MLWMLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.DOWN_CC.MLWMLQ.table, ontology=rep("CC", length(DEG.DOWN_CC.MLWMLQ.table$GO.ID)))

DEG.DOWN_MF.MLWMLQ.table.01 <- DEG.DOWN_MF.MLWMLQ.table[DEG.DOWN_MF.MLWMLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG.DOWN_CC.MLWMLQ.table.01 <- DEG.DOWN_CC.MLWMLQ.table[DEG.DOWN_CC.MLWMLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
