```{r extractgenesforGOs.MLWMLQ}
#get results table
results.MLWMLQ <- list(BP.ALL = DEG_BP.MLWMLQ.table,
  BP.UP = DEG.UP_BP.MLWMLQ.table, 
  BP.DOWN = DEG.DOWN_BP.MLWMLQ.table,
  MF.ALL = DEG_MF.MLWMLQ.table,
  MF.UP = DEG.UP_MF.MLWMLQ.table, 
  MF.DOWN = DEG.DOWN_MF.MLWMLQ.table,
  CC.ALL = DEG_CC.MLWMLQ.table,
  CC.UP = DEG.UP_CC.MLWMLQ.table, 
  CC.DOWN = DEG.DOWN_CC.MLWMLQ.table
)
  
#get a list of the godata objects
GOdata_list.MLWMLQ <- list(
  BP.ALL = DEgenes.MLWMLQ.GO.bp,
  BP.UP = DEgenes.MLWMLQ_UP.GO.bp, 
  BP.DOWN = DEgenes.MLWMLQ_DOWN.GO.bp,
  MF.ALL = DEgenes.MLWMLQ.GO.mf,
  MF.UP = DEgenes.MLWMLQ_UP.GO.mf, 
  MF.DOWN = DEgenes.MLWMLQ_DOWN.GO.mf,
  CC.ALL = DEgenes.MLWMLQ.GO.cc,
  CC.UP = DEgenes.MLWMLQ_UP.GO.cc, 
  CC.DOWN = DEgenes.MLWMLQ_DOWN.GO.cc
)

#geneID Extraction

# Step 1: Filter significant GO terms (p < 0.01), handling scientific notation
sig.terms_list.MLWMLQ <- lapply(results.MLWMLQ, function(tbl) {
    # Ensure p-values are numeric (handles cases where they are character strings like "1.2e-5")
    pvals <- as.numeric(tbl$raw.p.value)
    
    # Return GO.IDs with p < 0.01
    tbl$GO.ID[which(pvals < 0.01)]
})

# Step 2: Extract significant genes per GO term from each GOdata object
significant_genes_per_GO.MLWMLQ <- mapply(function(GOdata, go_ids) {
    # Get genes associated with each GO term
    genes_per_GO <- genesInTerm(object = GOdata, whichGO = go_ids)
    # Get significant genes from the GOdata object
    sigGenesSet <- sigGenes(GOdata)
    # Intersect genes in each GO term with the significant genes
    lapply(genes_per_GO, function(genes) intersect(genes, sigGenesSet))
  },
GOdata_list.MLWMLQ,
sig.terms_list.MLWMLQ,
SIMPLIFY = FALSE)



#plus terms
# Make a named vector of GO terms (Term names), per group
go_term_names_list.MLWMLQ <- lapply(results.MLWMLQ, function(tbl) {
  setNames(tbl$Term, tbl$GO.ID)
})



####This is the function that will be used across PW comparisons
#write_sig_genes_per_GO_to_excel()


write_sig_genes_per_GO_to_excel(
  sig_gene_list = significant_genes_per_GO.MLWMLQ,
  go_term_name_list = go_term_names_list.MLWMLQ,
  output_file = "Results/GenesPerGO/MLWMLQ_significant_genes_per_GO.xlsx"
)



#Verify the overlap of genes between all, up, down
#BP
genesMLWMLQ_BP_ALL <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.MLWMLQ$BP.ALL))
genesMLWMLQ_BP_UP <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.MLWMLQ$BP.UP))
genesMLWMLQ_BP_DOWN <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.MLWMLQ$BP.DOWN))

  #OVERLAP
  intersect(genesMLWMLQ_BP_ALL, genesMLWMLQ_BP_UP)
  table(genesMLWMLQ_BP_UP %in% genesMLWMLQ_BP_ALL)
  table(genesMLWMLQ_BP_UP %in% names(DEG.genelist.MLWMLQ))
  
  intersect(genesMLWMLQ_BP_ALL, genesMLWMLQ_BP_DOWN)
  table(genesMLWMLQ_BP_DOWN %in% genesMLWMLQ_BP_ALL)
  table(genesMLWMLQ_BP_DOWN %in% names(DEG.genelist.MLWMLQ))



#MF
genesMLWMLQ_MF_ALL <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.MLWMLQ$MF.ALL))
genesMLWMLQ_MF_UP <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.MLWMLQ$MF.UP)) #no ups
genesMLWMLQ_MF_DOWN <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.MLWMLQ$MF.DOWN))

  #OVERLAP
  intersect(genesMLWMLQ_MF_ALL, genesMLWMLQ_MF_UP)
  table(genesMLWMLQ_MF_UP %in% genesMLWMLQ_MF_ALL)
  table(genesMLWMLQ_MF_UP %in% names(DEG.genelist.MLWMLQ))
  
  intersect(genesMLWMLQ_MF_ALL, genesMLWMLQ_MF_DOWN)
  table(genesMLWMLQ_MF_DOWN %in% genesMLWMLQ_MF_ALL)
  table(genesMLWMLQ_MF_DOWN %in% names(DEG.genelist.MLWMLQ))



#CC
genesMLWMLQ_CC_ALL <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.MLWMLQ$CC.ALL))
genesMLWMLQ_CC_UP <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.MLWMLQ$CC.UP))
genesMLWMLQ_CC_DOWN <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.MLWMLQ$CC.DOWN))


  #OVERLAP
  intersect(genesMLWMLQ_CC_ALL, genesMLWMLQ_CC_UP)
  table(genesMLWMLQ_CC_UP %in% genesMLWMLQ_CC_ALL)
  table(genesMLWMLQ_CC_UP %in% names(DEG.genelist.MLWMLQ))
  
  intersect(genesMLWMLQ_CC_ALL, genesMLWMLQ_CC_DOWN)
  table(genesMLWMLQ_CC_DOWN %in% genesMLWMLQ_CC_ALL)
  table(genesMLWMLQ_CC_DOWN %in% names(DEG.genelist.MLWMLQ))


```






### QLWQLQ
#### Upregulated

#### BP
```{r BP_DEG_QLWQLQ_up}
GeneList_QLWQLQ_up <- as.integer(geneUniverse %in% DEgenes_UP.QLWQLQ)
names(GeneList_QLWQLQ_up) <- geneUniverse
LFCgenes <- function(x) x == 1

#verifying number of upreg genes with LFC < 1.5
table(GeneList_QLWQLQ_up)
#verifying the function
table(LFCgenes(GeneList_QLWQLQ_up))


DEgenes.QLWQLQ_UP.GO.bp <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEGUpGo", "BP", "QLWQLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "BP",
                # all upregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_QLWQLQ_up, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Run enrichment test using Fisher's exact test
DEG.QLWQLQ_UP.bp_result_Fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.QLWQLQ_UP.GO.bp, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.QLWQLQ_UP.bp_result_Fisher

DEG.UP_BP.QLWQLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.QLWQLQ_UP.GO.bp, 
                                   raw.p.value = DEG.QLWQLQ_UP.bp_result_Fisher, 
                                   topNodes = 50, 
                                   numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.UP_BP.QLWQLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/UP/byontology/QLWQLQ_UP_BPTerms.csv")
```




#### MF
```{r mf_DEG_QLWQLQ_up}
DEgenes.QLWQLQ_UP.GO.mf <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "MF", "QLWQLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "MF",
                # all upregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_QLWQLQ_up, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.QLWQLQ_UP.mf_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.QLWQLQ_UP.GO.mf, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.QLWQLQ_UP.mf_result_fisher

DEG.UP_MF.QLWQLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.QLWQLQ_UP.GO.mf, 
                                   raw.p.value = DEG.QLWQLQ_UP.mf_result_fisher, 
                                   topNodes = 50, 
                                   numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.UP_MF.QLWQLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/UP/byontology/QLWQLQ_UP_MFTerms.csv")
```



#### CC
```{r cc_DEG_QLWQLQ_up}
DEgenes.QLWQLQ_UP.GO.cc <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "CC", "QLWQLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "CC",
                # all upregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_QLWQLQ_up, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.QLWQLQ_UP.cc_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.QLWQLQ_UP.GO.cc, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.QLWQLQ_UP.cc_result_fisher

DEG.UP_CC.QLWQLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.QLWQLQ_UP.GO.cc, 
                                   raw.p.value = DEG.QLWQLQ_UP.cc_result_fisher, 
                                   topNodes = 50, 
                                   numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.UP_CC.QLWQLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/UP/byontology/QLWQLQ_UP_CCTerms.csv")
```

```{r QLWQLQlargetable.UP}
#ALL
DEG.UP_BP.QLWQLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.UP_BP.QLWQLQ.table, ontology=rep("BP", length(DEG.UP_BP.QLWQLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG.UP_MF.QLWQLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.UP_MF.QLWQLQ.table, ontology=rep("MF", length(DEG.UP_MF.QLWQLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG.UP_CC.QLWQLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.UP_CC.QLWQLQ.table, ontology=rep("CC", length(DEG.UP_CC.QLWQLQ.table$GO.ID)))

DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ.UPregulated <-rbind(DEG.UP_BP.QLWQLQ.table, DEG.UP_MF.QLWQLQ.table, DEG.UP_CC.QLWQLQ.table)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ.UPregulated, "Results/UpDownSplit/UP/ALL/DEGs_GOallontology_QLWQLQ_upregulated.csv")


#Less than .01
DEG.UP_BP.QLWQLQ.table.01 <- DEG.UP_BP.QLWQLQ.table[DEG.UP_BP.QLWQLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG.UP_MF.QLWQLQ.table.01 <- DEG.UP_MF.QLWQLQ.table[DEG.UP_MF.QLWQLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG.UP_CC.QLWQLQ.table.01 <- DEG.UP_CC.QLWQLQ.table[DEG.UP_CC.QLWQLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]

DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ.UPregulated.01 <-rbind(DEG.UP_BP.QLWQLQ.table.01, DEG.UP_MF.QLWQLQ.table.01, DEG.UP_CC.QLWQLQ.table.01)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ.UPregulated.01, "Results/UpDownSplit/point1percent/DEGs_GOallontology_QLWQLQ_upregulated.01.csv")
```


#### Downregulated
#### BP
```{r BP_DEG_QLWQLQ_down}
GeneList_QLWQLQ_down <- as.integer(geneUniverse %in% DEgenes_DOWN.QLWQLQ)
names(GeneList_QLWQLQ_down) <- geneUniverse

#verifying number of upreg genes with LFC < -1.5
table(GeneList_QLWQLQ_down)
#verifying the function
table(LFCgenes(GeneList_QLWQLQ_down))

DEgenes.QLWQLQ_DOWN.GO.bp <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEGDownGo", "BP", "QLWQLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "BP",
                # all downregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_QLWQLQ_down, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.QLWQLQ_DOWN.bp_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.QLWQLQ_DOWN.GO.bp, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.QLWQLQ_DOWN.bp_result_fisher

DEG.DOWN_BP.QLWQLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.QLWQLQ_DOWN.GO.bp, 
                                     raw.p.value = DEG.QLWQLQ_DOWN.bp_result_fisher, 
                                     topNodes = 50,
                                     numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.DOWN_BP.QLWQLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/DOWN/byontology/QLWQLQ_DOWN_BPTerms.csv")
```


#### MF
```{r mf_DEG_QLWQLQ_down}
DEgenes.QLWQLQ_DOWN.GO.mf <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "MF", "QLWQLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "MF",
                # all downregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_QLWQLQ_down, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.QLWQLQ_DOWN.mf_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.QLWQLQ_DOWN.GO.mf, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.QLWQLQ_DOWN.mf_result_fisher

DEG.DOWN_MF.QLWQLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.QLWQLQ_DOWN.GO.mf, 
                                     raw.p.value = DEG.QLWQLQ_DOWN.mf_result_fisher, 
                                     topNodes = 50, 
                                     numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.DOWN_MF.QLWQLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/DOWN/byontology/QLWQLQ_DOWN_MFTerms.csv")
```



#### CC
```{r cc_DEG_QLWQLQ_down}
DEgenes.QLWQLQ_DOWN.GO.cc <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "CC", "QLWQLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "CC",
                # all downregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_QLWQLQ_down, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.QLWQLQ_DOWN.cc_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.QLWQLQ_DOWN.GO.cc, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.QLWQLQ_DOWN.cc_result_fisher

DEG.DOWN_CC.QLWQLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.QLWQLQ_DOWN.GO.cc, 
                                     raw.p.value = DEG.QLWQLQ_DOWN.cc_result_fisher, 
                                     topNodes = 50,
                                     numChar = 120)
```

```{r QLWQLQlargetable.DOWN}
#ALL
DEG.DOWN_BP.QLWQLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.DOWN_BP.QLWQLQ.table, ontology=rep("BP", length(DEG.DOWN_BP.QLWQLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG.DOWN_MF.QLWQLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.DOWN_MF.QLWQLQ.table, ontology=rep("MF", length(DEG.DOWN_MF.QLWQLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG.DOWN_CC.QLWQLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.DOWN_CC.QLWQLQ.table, ontology=rep("CC", length(DEG.DOWN_CC.QLWQLQ.table$GO.ID)))

DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ.DOWNregulated <-rbind(DEG.DOWN_BP.QLWQLQ.table, DEG.DOWN_MF.QLWQLQ.table, DEG.DOWN_CC.QLWQLQ.table)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ.DOWNregulated, "Results/UpDownSplit/DOWN/ALL/DEGs_GOallontology_QLWQLQ_downregulated.csv")


#Less than .01
DEG.DOWN_BP.QLWQLQ.table.01 <- DEG.DOWN_BP.QLWQLQ.table[DEG.DOWN_BP.QLWQLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG.DOWN_MF.QLWQLQ.table.01 <- DEG.DOWN_MF.QLWQLQ.table[DEG.DOWN_MF.QLWQLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG.DOWN_CC.QLWQLQ.table.01 <- DEG.DOWN_CC.QLWQLQ.table[DEG.DOWN_CC.QLWQLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]

DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ.DOWNregulated.01 <-rbind(DEG.DOWN_BP.QLWQLQ.table.01, DEG.DOWN_MF.QLWQLQ.table.01, DEG.DOWN_CC.QLWQLQ.table.01)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.QLWQLQ.DOWNregulated.01, "Results/UpDownSplit/point1percent/DEGs_GOallontology_QLWQLQ_downregulated.01.csv")
```



```{r extractgenesforGOs.QLWQLQ}
#get results table
results.QLWQLQ <- list(BP.ALL = DEG_BP.QLWQLQ.table,
  BP.UP = DEG.UP_BP.QLWQLQ.table, 
  BP.DOWN = DEG.DOWN_BP.QLWQLQ.table,
  MF.ALL = DEG_MF.QLWQLQ.table,
  MF.UP = DEG.UP_MF.QLWQLQ.table, 
  MF.DOWN = DEG.DOWN_MF.QLWQLQ.table,
  CC.ALL = DEG_CC.QLWQLQ.table,
  CC.UP = DEG.UP_CC.QLWQLQ.table, 
  CC.DOWN = DEG.DOWN_CC.QLWQLQ.table
)
  
#get a list of the godata objects
GOdata_list.QLWQLQ <- list(
  BP.ALL = DEgenes.QLWQLQ.GO.bp,
  BP.UP = DEgenes.QLWQLQ_UP.GO.bp, 
  BP.DOWN = DEgenes.QLWQLQ_DOWN.GO.bp,
  MF.ALL = DEgenes.QLWQLQ.GO.mf,
  MF.UP = DEgenes.QLWQLQ_UP.GO.mf, 
  MF.DOWN = DEgenes.QLWQLQ_DOWN.GO.mf,
  CC.ALL = DEgenes.QLWQLQ.GO.cc,
  CC.UP = DEgenes.QLWQLQ_UP.GO.cc, 
  CC.DOWN = DEgenes.QLWQLQ_DOWN.GO.cc
)

#geneID Extraction

# Step 1: Filter significant GO terms (p < 0.01), handling scientific notation
sig.terms_list.QLWQLQ <- lapply(results.QLWQLQ, function(tbl) {
    # Ensure p-values are numeric (handles cases where they are character strings like "1.2e-5")
    pvals <- as.numeric(tbl$raw.p.value)
    
    # Return GO.IDs with p < 0.01
    tbl$GO.ID[which(pvals < 0.01)]
})

# Step 2: Extract significant genes per GO term from each GOdata object
significant_genes_per_GO.QLWQLQ <- mapply(function(GOdata, go_ids) {
    # Get genes associated with each GO term
    genes_per_GO <- genesInTerm(object = GOdata, whichGO = go_ids)
    # Get significant genes from the GOdata object
    sigGenesSet <- sigGenes(GOdata)
    # Intersect genes in each GO term with the significant genes
    lapply(genes_per_GO, function(genes) intersect(genes, sigGenesSet))
  },
GOdata_list.QLWQLQ,
sig.terms_list.QLWQLQ,
SIMPLIFY = FALSE)



#plus terms
# Make a named vector of GO terms (Term names), per group
go_term_names_list.QLWQLQ <- lapply(results.QLWQLQ, function(tbl) {
  setNames(tbl$Term, tbl$GO.ID)
})



####This is the function that will be used across PW comparisons
#write_sig_genes_per_GO_to_excel()


write_sig_genes_per_GO_to_excel(
  sig_gene_list = significant_genes_per_GO.QLWQLQ,
  go_term_name_list = go_term_names_list.QLWQLQ,
  output_file = "Results/GenesPerGO/QLWQLQ_significant_genes_per_GO.xlsx"
)



#Verify the overlap of genes between all, up, down
#BP
genesQLWQLQ_BP_ALL <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.QLWQLQ$BP.ALL))
genesQLWQLQ_BP_UP <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.QLWQLQ$BP.UP))
genesQLWQLQ_BP_DOWN <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.QLWQLQ$BP.DOWN))

  #OVERLAP
  intersect(genesQLWQLQ_BP_ALL, genesQLWQLQ_BP_UP)
  table(genesQLWQLQ_BP_UP %in% genesQLWQLQ_BP_ALL)
  table(genesQLWQLQ_BP_UP %in% names(DEG.genelist.QLWQLQ))
  
  intersect(genesQLWQLQ_BP_ALL, genesQLWQLQ_BP_DOWN)
  table(genesQLWQLQ_BP_DOWN %in% genesQLWQLQ_BP_ALL)
  table(genesQLWQLQ_BP_DOWN %in% names(DEG.genelist.QLWQLQ))



#MF
genesQLWQLQ_MF_ALL <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.QLWQLQ$MF.ALL))
genesQLWQLQ_MF_UP <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.QLWQLQ$MF.UP))
genesQLWQLQ_MF_DOWN <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.QLWQLQ$MF.DOWN))

  #OVERLAP
  intersect(genesQLWQLQ_MF_ALL, genesQLWQLQ_MF_UP)
  table(genesQLWQLQ_MF_UP %in% genesQLWQLQ_MF_ALL)
  table(genesQLWQLQ_MF_UP %in% names(DEG.genelist.QLWQLQ))
  
  intersect(genesQLWQLQ_MF_ALL, genesQLWQLQ_MF_DOWN)
  table(genesQLWQLQ_MF_DOWN %in% genesQLWQLQ_MF_ALL)
  table(genesQLWQLQ_MF_DOWN %in% names(DEG.genelist.QLWQLQ))



#CC
genesQLWQLQ_CC_ALL <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.QLWQLQ$CC.ALL))
genesQLWQLQ_CC_UP <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.QLWQLQ$CC.UP))
genesQLWQLQ_CC_DOWN <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.QLWQLQ$CC.DOWN))


  #OVERLAP
  intersect(genesQLWQLQ_CC_ALL, genesQLWQLQ_CC_UP)
  table(genesQLWQLQ_CC_UP %in% genesQLWQLQ_CC_ALL)
  table(genesQLWQLQ_CC_UP %in% names(DEG.genelist.QLWQLQ))
  
  intersect(genesQLWQLQ_CC_ALL, genesQLWQLQ_CC_DOWN)
  table(genesQLWQLQ_CC_DOWN %in% genesQLWQLQ_CC_ALL)
  table(genesQLWQLQ_CC_DOWN %in% names(DEG.genelist.QLWQLQ))


```


### FLQMLQ
#### Upregulated

#### BP
```{r BP_DEG_FLQMLQ_up}
GeneList_FLQMLQ_up <- as.integer(geneUniverse %in% DEgenes_UP.FLQMLQ)
names(GeneList_FLQMLQ_up) <- geneUniverse
LFCgenes <- function(x) x == 1

#verifying number of upreg genes with LFC < 1.5
table(GeneList_FLQMLQ_up)
#verifying the function
table(LFCgenes(GeneList_FLQMLQ_up))


DEgenes.FLQMLQ_UP.GO.bp <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEGUpGo", "BP", "FLQMLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "BP",
                # all upregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_FLQMLQ_up, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Run enrichment test using Fisher's exact test
DEG.FLQMLQ_UP.bp_result_Fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLQMLQ_UP.GO.bp, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLQMLQ_UP.bp_result_Fisher

DEG.UP_BP.FLQMLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLQMLQ_UP.GO.bp, 
                                   raw.p.value = DEG.FLQMLQ_UP.bp_result_Fisher, 
                                   topNodes = 50, 
                                   numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.UP_BP.FLQMLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/UP/byontology/FLQMLQ_UP_BPTerms.csv")
```




#### MF
```{r mf_DEG_FLQMLQ_up}
DEgenes.FLQMLQ_UP.GO.mf <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "MF", "FLQMLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "MF",
                # all upregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_FLQMLQ_up, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLQMLQ_UP.mf_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLQMLQ_UP.GO.mf, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLQMLQ_UP.mf_result_fisher

DEG.UP_MF.FLQMLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLQMLQ_UP.GO.mf, 
                                   raw.p.value = DEG.FLQMLQ_UP.mf_result_fisher, 
                                   topNodes = 50, 
                                   numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.UP_MF.FLQMLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/UP/byontology/FLQMLQ_UP_MFTerms.csv")
```



#### CC
```{r cc_DEG_FLQMLQ_up}
DEgenes.FLQMLQ_UP.GO.cc <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "CC", "FLQMLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "CC",
                # all upregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_FLQMLQ_up, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLQMLQ_UP.cc_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLQMLQ_UP.GO.cc, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLQMLQ_UP.cc_result_fisher

DEG.UP_CC.FLQMLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLQMLQ_UP.GO.cc, 
                                   raw.p.value = DEG.FLQMLQ_UP.cc_result_fisher, 
                                   topNodes = 50, 
                                   numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.UP_CC.FLQMLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/UP/byontology/FLQMLQ_UP_CCTerms.csv")
```

```{r FLQMLQlargetable.UP}
#ALL
DEG.UP_BP.FLQMLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.UP_BP.FLQMLQ.table, ontology=rep("BP", length(DEG.UP_BP.FLQMLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG.UP_MF.FLQMLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.UP_MF.FLQMLQ.table, ontology=rep("MF", length(DEG.UP_MF.FLQMLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG.UP_CC.FLQMLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.UP_CC.FLQMLQ.table, ontology=rep("CC", length(DEG.UP_CC.FLQMLQ.table$GO.ID)))

DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.UPregulated <-rbind(DEG.UP_BP.FLQMLQ.table, DEG.UP_MF.FLQMLQ.table, DEG.UP_CC.FLQMLQ.table)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.UPregulated, "Results/UpDownSplit/UP/ALL/DEGs_GOallontology_FLQMLQ_upregulated.csv")


#Less than .01
DEG.UP_BP.FLQMLQ.table.01 <- DEG.UP_BP.FLQMLQ.table[DEG.UP_BP.FLQMLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG.UP_MF.FLQMLQ.table.01 <- DEG.UP_MF.FLQMLQ.table[DEG.UP_MF.FLQMLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG.UP_CC.FLQMLQ.table.01 <- DEG.UP_CC.FLQMLQ.table[DEG.UP_CC.FLQMLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]

DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.UPregulated.01 <-rbind(DEG.UP_BP.FLQMLQ.table.01, DEG.UP_MF.FLQMLQ.table.01, DEG.UP_CC.FLQMLQ.table.01)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.UPregulated.01, "Results/UpDownSplit/point1percent/DEGs_GOallontology_FLQMLQ_upregulated.01.csv")
```


#### Downregulated
#### BP
```{r BP_DEG_FLQMLQ_down}
GeneList_FLQMLQ_down <- as.integer(geneUniverse %in% DEgenes_DOWN.FLQMLQ)
names(GeneList_FLQMLQ_down) <- geneUniverse

#verifying number of upreg genes with LFC < -1.5
table(GeneList_FLQMLQ_down)
#verifying the function
table(LFCgenes(GeneList_FLQMLQ_down))

DEgenes.FLQMLQ_DOWN.GO.bp <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEGDownGo", "BP", "FLQMLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "BP",
                # all downregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_FLQMLQ_down, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLQMLQ_DOWN.bp_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLQMLQ_DOWN.GO.bp, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLQMLQ_DOWN.bp_result_fisher

DEG.DOWN_BP.FLQMLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLQMLQ_DOWN.GO.bp, 
                                     raw.p.value = DEG.FLQMLQ_DOWN.bp_result_fisher, 
                                     topNodes = 50,
                                     numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.DOWN_BP.FLQMLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/DOWN/byontology/FLQMLQ_DOWN_BPTerms.csv")
```


#### MF
```{r mf_DEG_FLQMLQ_down}
DEgenes.FLQMLQ_DOWN.GO.mf <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "MF", "FLQMLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "MF",
                # all downregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_FLQMLQ_down, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLQMLQ_DOWN.mf_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLQMLQ_DOWN.GO.mf, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLQMLQ_DOWN.mf_result_fisher

DEG.DOWN_MF.FLQMLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLQMLQ_DOWN.GO.mf, 
                                     raw.p.value = DEG.FLQMLQ_DOWN.mf_result_fisher, 
                                     topNodes = 50, 
                                     numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.DOWN_MF.FLQMLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/DOWN/byontology/FLQMLQ_DOWN_MFTerms.csv")
```



#### CC
```{r cc_DEG_FLQMLQ_down}
DEgenes.FLQMLQ_DOWN.GO.cc <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "CC", "FLQMLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "CC",
                # all downregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_FLQMLQ_down, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLQMLQ_DOWN.cc_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLQMLQ_DOWN.GO.cc, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLQMLQ_DOWN.cc_result_fisher

DEG.DOWN_CC.FLQMLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLQMLQ_DOWN.GO.cc, 
                                     raw.p.value = DEG.FLQMLQ_DOWN.cc_result_fisher, 
                                     topNodes = 50,
                                     numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.DOWN_CC.FLQMLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/DOWN/byontology/FLQMLQ_DOWN_CCTerms.csv")
```

```{r FLQMLQlargetable.DOWN}
#ALL
DEG.DOWN_BP.FLQMLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.DOWN_BP.FLQMLQ.table, ontology=rep("BP", length(DEG.DOWN_BP.FLQMLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG.DOWN_MF.FLQMLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.DOWN_MF.FLQMLQ.table, ontology=rep("MF", length(DEG.DOWN_MF.FLQMLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG.DOWN_CC.FLQMLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.DOWN_CC.FLQMLQ.table, ontology=rep("CC", length(DEG.DOWN_CC.FLQMLQ.table$GO.ID)))

DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.DOWNregulated <-rbind(DEG.DOWN_BP.FLQMLQ.table, DEG.DOWN_MF.FLQMLQ.table, DEG.DOWN_CC.FLQMLQ.table)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.DOWNregulated, "Results/UpDownSplit/DOWN/ALL/DEGs_GOallontology_FLQMLQ_downregulated.csv")


#Less than .01
DEG.DOWN_BP.FLQMLQ.table.01 <- DEG.DOWN_BP.FLQMLQ.table[DEG.DOWN_BP.FLQMLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG.DOWN_MF.FLQMLQ.table.01 <- DEG.DOWN_MF.FLQMLQ.table[DEG.DOWN_MF.FLQMLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG.DOWN_CC.FLQMLQ.table.01 <- DEG.DOWN_CC.FLQMLQ.table[DEG.DOWN_CC.FLQMLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]

DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.DOWNregulated.01 <-rbind(DEG.DOWN_BP.FLQMLQ.table.01, DEG.DOWN_MF.FLQMLQ.table.01, DEG.DOWN_CC.FLQMLQ.table.01)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLQMLQ.DOWNregulated.01, "Results/UpDownSplit/point1percent/DEGs_GOallontology_FLQMLQ_downregulated.01.csv")
```



```{r extractgenesforGOs.FLQMLQ}
#get results table
results.FLQMLQ <- list(BP.ALL = DEG_BP.FLQMLQ.table,
  BP.UP = DEG.UP_BP.FLQMLQ.table, 
  BP.DOWN = DEG.DOWN_BP.FLQMLQ.table,
  MF.ALL = DEG_MF.FLQMLQ.table,
  MF.UP = DEG.UP_MF.FLQMLQ.table, 
  MF.DOWN = DEG.DOWN_MF.FLQMLQ.table,
  CC.ALL = DEG_CC.FLQMLQ.table,
  CC.UP = DEG.UP_CC.FLQMLQ.table, 
  CC.DOWN = DEG.DOWN_CC.FLQMLQ.table
)
  
#get a list of the godata objects
GOdata_list.FLQMLQ <- list(
  BP.ALL = DEgenes.FLQMLQ.GO.bp,
  BP.UP = DEgenes.FLQMLQ_UP.GO.bp, 
  BP.DOWN = DEgenes.FLQMLQ_DOWN.GO.bp,
  MF.ALL = DEgenes.FLQMLQ.GO.mf,
  MF.UP = DEgenes.FLQMLQ_UP.GO.mf, 
  MF.DOWN = DEgenes.FLQMLQ_DOWN.GO.mf,
  CC.ALL = DEgenes.FLQMLQ.GO.cc,
  CC.UP = DEgenes.FLQMLQ_UP.GO.cc, 
  CC.DOWN = DEgenes.FLQMLQ_DOWN.GO.cc
)

#geneID Extraction

# Step 1: Filter significant GO terms (p < 0.01), handling scientific notation
sig.terms_list.FLQMLQ <- lapply(results.FLQMLQ, function(tbl) {
    # Ensure p-values are numeric (handles cases where they are character strings like "1.2e-5")
    pvals <- as.numeric(tbl$raw.p.value)
    
    # Return GO.IDs with p < 0.01
    tbl$GO.ID[which(pvals < 0.01)]
})

# Step 2: Extract significant genes per GO term from each GOdata object
significant_genes_per_GO.FLQMLQ <- mapply(function(GOdata, go_ids) {
    # Get genes associated with each GO term
    genes_per_GO <- genesInTerm(object = GOdata, whichGO = go_ids)
    # Get significant genes from the GOdata object
    sigGenesSet <- sigGenes(GOdata)
    # Intersect genes in each GO term with the significant genes
    lapply(genes_per_GO, function(genes) intersect(genes, sigGenesSet))
  },
GOdata_list.FLQMLQ,
sig.terms_list.FLQMLQ,
SIMPLIFY = FALSE)



#plus terms
# Make a named vector of GO terms (Term names), per group
go_term_names_list.FLQMLQ <- lapply(results.FLQMLQ, function(tbl) {
  setNames(tbl$Term, tbl$GO.ID)
})



####This is the function that will be used across PW comparisons
#write_sig_genes_per_GO_to_excel()


write_sig_genes_per_GO_to_excel(
  sig_gene_list = significant_genes_per_GO.FLQMLQ,
  go_term_name_list = go_term_names_list.FLQMLQ,
  output_file = "Results/GenesPerGO/FLQMLQ_significant_genes_per_GO.xlsx"
)



#Verify the overlap of genes between all, up, down
#BP
genesFLQMLQ_BP_ALL <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLQMLQ$BP.ALL))
genesFLQMLQ_BP_UP <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLQMLQ$BP.UP))
genesFLQMLQ_BP_DOWN <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLQMLQ$BP.DOWN))

  #OVERLAP
  intersect(genesFLQMLQ_BP_ALL, genesFLQMLQ_BP_UP)
  table(genesFLQMLQ_BP_UP %in% genesFLQMLQ_BP_ALL)
  table(genesFLQMLQ_BP_UP %in% names(DEG.genelist.FLQMLQ))
  
  intersect(genesFLQMLQ_BP_ALL, genesFLQMLQ_BP_DOWN)
  table(genesFLQMLQ_BP_DOWN %in% genesFLQMLQ_BP_ALL)
  table(genesFLQMLQ_BP_DOWN %in% names(DEG.genelist.FLQMLQ))



#MF
genesFLQMLQ_MF_ALL <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLQMLQ$MF.ALL))
genesFLQMLQ_MF_UP <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLQMLQ$MF.UP))
genesFLQMLQ_MF_DOWN <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLQMLQ$MF.DOWN))

  #OVERLAP
  intersect(genesFLQMLQ_MF_ALL, genesFLQMLQ_MF_UP)
  table(genesFLQMLQ_MF_UP %in% genesFLQMLQ_MF_ALL)
  table(genesFLQMLQ_MF_UP %in% names(DEG.genelist.FLQMLQ))
  
  intersect(genesFLQMLQ_MF_ALL, genesFLQMLQ_MF_DOWN)
  table(genesFLQMLQ_MF_DOWN %in% genesFLQMLQ_MF_ALL)
  table(genesFLQMLQ_MF_DOWN %in% names(DEG.genelist.FLQMLQ))



#CC
genesFLQMLQ_CC_ALL <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLQMLQ$CC.ALL))
genesFLQMLQ_CC_UP <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLQMLQ$CC.UP))
genesFLQMLQ_CC_DOWN <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLQMLQ$CC.DOWN))


  #OVERLAP
  intersect(genesFLQMLQ_CC_ALL, genesFLQMLQ_CC_UP)
  table(genesFLQMLQ_CC_UP %in% genesFLQMLQ_CC_ALL)
  table(genesFLQMLQ_CC_UP %in% names(DEG.genelist.FLQMLQ))
  
  intersect(genesFLQMLQ_CC_ALL, genesFLQMLQ_CC_DOWN)
  table(genesFLQMLQ_CC_DOWN %in% genesFLQMLQ_CC_ALL)
  table(genesFLQMLQ_CC_DOWN %in% names(DEG.genelist.FLQMLQ))


```






### FLQQLQ
#### Upregulated

#### BP
```{r BP_DEG_FLQQLQ_up}
GeneList_FLQQLQ_up <- as.integer(geneUniverse %in% DEgenes_UP.FLQQLQ)
names(GeneList_FLQQLQ_up) <- geneUniverse
LFCgenes <- function(x) x == 1

#verifying number of upreg genes with LFC < 1.5
table(GeneList_FLQQLQ_up)
#verifying the function
table(LFCgenes(GeneList_FLQQLQ_up))


DEgenes.FLQQLQ_UP.GO.bp <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEGUpGo", "BP", "FLQQLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "BP",
                # all upregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_FLQQLQ_up, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Run enrichment test using Fisher's exact test
DEG.FLQQLQ_UP.bp_result_Fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLQQLQ_UP.GO.bp, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLQQLQ_UP.bp_result_Fisher

DEG.UP_BP.FLQQLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLQQLQ_UP.GO.bp, 
                                   raw.p.value = DEG.FLQQLQ_UP.bp_result_Fisher, 
                                   topNodes = 50, 
                                   numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.UP_BP.FLQQLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/UP/byontology/FLQQLQ_UP_BPTerms.csv")
```




#### MF
```{r mf_DEG_FLQQLQ_up}
DEgenes.FLQQLQ_UP.GO.mf <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "MF", "FLQQLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "MF",
                # all upregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_FLQQLQ_up, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLQQLQ_UP.mf_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLQQLQ_UP.GO.mf, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLQQLQ_UP.mf_result_fisher

DEG.UP_MF.FLQQLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLQQLQ_UP.GO.mf, 
                                   raw.p.value = DEG.FLQQLQ_UP.mf_result_fisher, 
                                   topNodes = 50, 
                                   numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.UP_MF.FLQQLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/UP/byontology/FLQQLQ_UP_MFTerms.csv")
```



#### CC
```{r cc_DEG_FLQQLQ_up}
DEgenes.FLQQLQ_UP.GO.cc <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "CC", "FLQQLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "CC",
                # all upregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_FLQQLQ_up, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLQQLQ_UP.cc_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLQQLQ_UP.GO.cc, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLQQLQ_UP.cc_result_fisher

DEG.UP_CC.FLQQLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLQQLQ_UP.GO.cc, 
                                   raw.p.value = DEG.FLQQLQ_UP.cc_result_fisher, 
                                   topNodes = 50, 
                                   numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.UP_CC.FLQQLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/UP/byontology/FLQQLQ_UP_CCTerms.csv")
```

```{r FLQQLQlargetable.UP}
#ALL
DEG.UP_BP.FLQQLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.UP_BP.FLQQLQ.table, ontology=rep("BP", length(DEG.UP_BP.FLQQLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG.UP_MF.FLQQLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.UP_MF.FLQQLQ.table, ontology=rep("MF", length(DEG.UP_MF.FLQQLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG.UP_CC.FLQQLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.UP_CC.FLQQLQ.table, ontology=rep("CC", length(DEG.UP_CC.FLQQLQ.table$GO.ID)))

DEG_GOallontology.FLQQLQ.UPregulated <-rbind(DEG.UP_BP.FLQQLQ.table, DEG.UP_MF.FLQQLQ.table, DEG.UP_CC.FLQQLQ.table)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLQQLQ.UPregulated, "Results/UpDownSplit/UP/ALL/DEGs_GOallontology_FLQQLQ_upregulated.csv")


#Less than .01
DEG.UP_BP.FLQQLQ.table.01 <- DEG.UP_BP.FLQQLQ.table[DEG.UP_BP.FLQQLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG.UP_MF.FLQQLQ.table.01 <- DEG.UP_MF.FLQQLQ.table[DEG.UP_MF.FLQQLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG.UP_CC.FLQQLQ.table.01 <- DEG.UP_CC.FLQQLQ.table[DEG.UP_CC.FLQQLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]

DEG_GOallontology.FLQQLQ.UPregulated.01 <-rbind(DEG.UP_BP.FLQQLQ.table.01, DEG.UP_MF.FLQQLQ.table.01, DEG.UP_CC.FLQQLQ.table.01)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLQQLQ.UPregulated.01, "Results/UpDownSplit/point1percent/DEGs_GOallontology_FLQQLQ_upregulated.01.csv")
```


#### Downregulated
#### BP
```{r BP_DEG_FLQQLQ_down}
GeneList_FLQQLQ_down <- as.integer(geneUniverse %in% DEgenes_DOWN.FLQQLQ)
names(GeneList_FLQQLQ_down) <- geneUniverse

#verifying number of upreg genes with LFC < -1.5
table(GeneList_FLQQLQ_down)
#verifying the function
table(LFCgenes(GeneList_FLQQLQ_down))

DEgenes.FLQQLQ_DOWN.GO.bp <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEGDownGo", "BP", "FLQQLQ", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "BP",
                # all downregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_FLQQLQ_down, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLQQLQ_DOWN.bp_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLQQLQ_DOWN.GO.bp, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLQQLQ_DOWN.bp_result_fisher

DEG.DOWN_BP.FLQQLQ.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLQQLQ_DOWN.GO.bp, 
                                     raw.p.value = DEG.FLQQLQ_DOWN.bp_result_fisher, 
                                     topNodes = 50,
                                     numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.DOWN_BP.FLQQLQ.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/DOWN/byontology/FLQQLQ_DOWN_BPTerms.csv")
```

```{r FLQQLQlargetable.DOWN}
DEG.DOWN_MF.FLQQLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.DOWN_MF.FLQQLQ.table, ontology=rep("MF", length(DEG.DOWN_MF.FLQQLQ.table$GO.ID)))
DEG.DOWN_CC.FLQQLQ.table <- cbind(DEG.DOWN_CC.FLQQLQ.table, ontology=rep("CC", length(DEG.DOWN_CC.FLQQLQ.table$GO.ID)))

DEG_GOallontology.FLQQLQ.DOWNregulated <-rbind(DEG.DOWN_BP.FLQQLQ.table, DEG.DOWN_MF.FLQQLQ.table, DEG.DOWN_CC.FLQQLQ.table)

DEG.DOWN_MF.FLQQLQ.table.01 <- DEG.DOWN_MF.FLQQLQ.table[DEG.DOWN_MF.FLQQLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG.DOWN_CC.FLQQLQ.table.01 <- DEG.DOWN_CC.FLQQLQ.table[DEG.DOWN_CC.FLQQLQ.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
```

```{r extractgenesforGOs.FLQQLQ}
#get results table
results.FLQQLQ <- list(BP.ALL = DEG_BP.FLQQLQ.table,
  BP.UP = DEG.UP_BP.FLQQLQ.table, 
  BP.DOWN = DEG.DOWN_BP.FLQQLQ.table,
  MF.ALL = DEG_MF.FLQQLQ.table,
  MF.UP = DEG.UP_MF.FLQQLQ.table, 
  MF.DOWN = DEG.DOWN_MF.FLQQLQ.table,
  CC.ALL = DEG_CC.FLQQLQ.table,
  CC.UP = DEG.UP_CC.FLQQLQ.table, 
  CC.DOWN = DEG.DOWN_CC.FLQQLQ.table
)
  
#get a list of the godata objects
GOdata_list.FLQQLQ <- list(
  BP.ALL = DEgenes.FLQQLQ.GO.bp,
  BP.UP = DEgenes.FLQQLQ_UP.GO.bp, 
  BP.DOWN = DEgenes.FLQQLQ_DOWN.GO.bp,
  MF.ALL = DEgenes.FLQQLQ.GO.mf,
  MF.UP = DEgenes.FLQQLQ_UP.GO.mf, 
  MF.DOWN = DEgenes.FLQQLQ_DOWN.GO.mf,
  CC.ALL = DEgenes.FLQQLQ.GO.cc,
  CC.UP = DEgenes.FLQQLQ_UP.GO.cc, 
  CC.DOWN = DEgenes.FLQQLQ_DOWN.GO.cc
)

#geneID Extraction

# Step 1: Filter significant GO terms (p < 0.01), handling scientific notation
sig.terms_list.FLQQLQ <- lapply(results.FLQQLQ, function(tbl) {
    # Ensure p-values are numeric (handles cases where they are character strings like "1.2e-5")
    pvals <- as.numeric(tbl$raw.p.value)
    
    # Return GO.IDs with p < 0.01
    tbl$GO.ID[which(pvals < 0.01)]
})

# Step 2: Extract significant genes per GO term from each GOdata object
significant_genes_per_GO.FLQQLQ <- mapply(function(GOdata, go_ids) {
    # Get genes associated with each GO term
    genes_per_GO <- genesInTerm(object = GOdata, whichGO = go_ids)
    # Get significant genes from the GOdata object
    sigGenesSet <- sigGenes(GOdata)
    # Intersect genes in each GO term with the significant genes
    lapply(genes_per_GO, function(genes) intersect(genes, sigGenesSet))
  },
GOdata_list.FLQQLQ,
sig.terms_list.FLQQLQ,
SIMPLIFY = FALSE)



#plus terms
# Make a named vector of GO terms (Term names), per group
go_term_names_list.FLQQLQ <- lapply(results.FLQQLQ, function(tbl) {
  setNames(tbl$Term, tbl$GO.ID)
})



####This is the function that will be used across PW comparisons
#write_sig_genes_per_GO_to_excel()


write_sig_genes_per_GO_to_excel(
  sig_gene_list = significant_genes_per_GO.FLQQLQ,
  go_term_name_list = go_term_names_list.FLQQLQ,
  output_file = "Results/GenesPerGO/FLQQLQ_significant_genes_per_GO.xlsx"
)



#Verify the overlap of genes between all, up, down
#BP
genesFLQQLQ_BP_ALL <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLQQLQ$BP.ALL))
genesFLQQLQ_BP_UP <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLQQLQ$BP.UP))
genesFLQQLQ_BP_DOWN <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLQQLQ$BP.DOWN))

  #OVERLAP
  intersect(genesFLQQLQ_BP_ALL, genesFLQQLQ_BP_UP)
  table(genesFLQQLQ_BP_UP %in% genesFLQQLQ_BP_ALL)
  table(genesFLQQLQ_BP_UP %in% names(DEG.genelist.FLQQLQ))
  
  intersect(genesFLQQLQ_BP_ALL, genesFLQQLQ_BP_DOWN)
  table(genesFLQQLQ_BP_DOWN %in% genesFLQQLQ_BP_ALL)
  table(genesFLQQLQ_BP_DOWN %in% names(DEG.genelist.FLQQLQ))



#MF
genesFLQQLQ_MF_ALL <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLQQLQ$MF.ALL))
genesFLQQLQ_MF_UP <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLQQLQ$MF.UP))
genesFLQQLQ_MF_DOWN <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLQQLQ$MF.DOWN))

  #OVERLAP
  intersect(genesFLQQLQ_MF_ALL, genesFLQQLQ_MF_UP)
  table(genesFLQQLQ_MF_UP %in% genesFLQQLQ_MF_ALL)
  table(genesFLQQLQ_MF_UP %in% names(DEG.genelist.FLQQLQ))
  
  intersect(genesFLQQLQ_MF_ALL, genesFLQQLQ_MF_DOWN)
  table(genesFLQQLQ_MF_DOWN %in% genesFLQQLQ_MF_ALL)
  table(genesFLQQLQ_MF_DOWN %in% names(DEG.genelist.FLQQLQ))



#CC
genesFLQQLQ_CC_ALL <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLQQLQ$CC.ALL))
genesFLQQLQ_CC_UP <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLQQLQ$CC.UP))
genesFLQQLQ_CC_DOWN <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLQQLQ$CC.DOWN))


  #OVERLAP
  intersect(genesFLQQLQ_CC_ALL, genesFLQQLQ_CC_UP)
  table(genesFLQQLQ_CC_UP %in% genesFLQQLQ_CC_ALL)
  table(genesFLQQLQ_CC_UP %in% names(DEG.genelist.FLQQLQ))
  
  intersect(genesFLQQLQ_CC_ALL, genesFLQQLQ_CC_DOWN)
  table(genesFLQQLQ_CC_DOWN %in% genesFLQQLQ_CC_ALL)
  table(genesFLQQLQ_CC_DOWN %in% names(DEG.genelist.FLQQLQ))


```








### FLWMLW
#### Upregulated
No upregulated genes.



#### Downregulated
#### BP
```{r BP_DEG_FLWMLW_down}
GeneList_FLWMLW_down <- as.integer(geneUniverse %in% DEgenes_DOWN.FLWMLW)
names(GeneList_FLWMLW_down) <- geneUniverse

#verifying number of upreg genes with LFC < -1.5
table(GeneList_FLWMLW_down)
#verifying the function
table(LFCgenes(GeneList_FLWMLW_down))

DEgenes.FLWMLW_DOWN.GO.bp <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEGDownGo", "BP", "FLWMLW", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "BP",
                # all downregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_FLWMLW_down, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLWMLW_DOWN.bp_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLWMLW_DOWN.GO.bp, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLWMLW_DOWN.bp_result_fisher

DEG.DOWN_BP.FLWMLW.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLWMLW_DOWN.GO.bp, 
                                     raw.p.value = DEG.FLWMLW_DOWN.bp_result_fisher, 
                                     topNodes = 50,
                                     numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.DOWN_BP.FLWMLW.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/DOWN/byontology/FLWMLW_DOWN_BPTerms.csv")
```


#### MF
```{r mf_DEG_FLWMLW_down}
DEgenes.FLWMLW_DOWN.GO.mf <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "MF", "FLWMLW", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "MF",
                # all downregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_FLWMLW_down, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLWMLW_DOWN.mf_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLWMLW_DOWN.GO.mf, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLWMLW_DOWN.mf_result_fisher

DEG.DOWN_MF.FLWMLW.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLWMLW_DOWN.GO.mf, 
                                     raw.p.value = DEG.FLWMLW_DOWN.mf_result_fisher, 
                                     topNodes = 50, 
                                     numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.DOWN_MF.FLWMLW.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/DOWN/byontology/FLWMLW_DOWN_MFTerms.csv")
```



#### CC
```{r cc_DEG_FLWMLW_down}
DEgenes.FLWMLW_DOWN.GO.cc <- new("topGOdata",
                description = paste("DEG Go", "CC", "FLWMLW", sep = "_"),
                ontology = "CC",
                # all downregulated genes in this comparison, genes of interest = 1
                allGenes = GeneList_FLWMLW_down, 
                geneSelectionFun = LFCgenes,
                gene2GO = gene2mapping,
                annot = annFUN.gene2GO)


#Fisher Testing
DEG.FLWMLW_DOWN.cc_result_fisher <- runTest(DEgenes.FLWMLW_DOWN.GO.cc, statistic = "fisher", algorithm = "weight01")
DEG.FLWMLW_DOWN.cc_result_fisher

DEG.DOWN_CC.FLWMLW.table <- GenTable(DEgenes.FLWMLW_DOWN.GO.cc, 
                                     raw.p.value = DEG.FLWMLW_DOWN.cc_result_fisher, 
                                     topNodes = 50,
                                     numChar = 120)

write.csv(DEG.DOWN_CC.FLWMLW.table, "Results/UpDownSplit/DOWN/byontology/FLWMLW_DOWN_CCTerms.csv")
```

```{r FLWMLWlargetable.DOWN}
#ALL
DEG.DOWN_BP.FLWMLW.table <- cbind(DEG.DOWN_BP.FLWMLW.table, ontology=rep("BP", length(DEG.DOWN_BP.FLWMLW.table$GO.ID)))
DEG.DOWN_MF.FLWMLW.table <- cbind(DEG.DOWN_MF.FLWMLW.table, ontology=rep("MF", length(DEG.DOWN_MF.FLWMLW.table$GO.ID)))
DEG.DOWN_CC.FLWMLW.table <- cbind(DEG.DOWN_CC.FLWMLW.table, ontology=rep("CC", length(DEG.DOWN_CC.FLWMLW.table$GO.ID)))

DEG_GOallontology.FLWMLW.DOWNregulated <-rbind(DEG.DOWN_BP.FLWMLW.table, DEG.DOWN_MF.FLWMLW.table, DEG.DOWN_CC.FLWMLW.table)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLWMLW.DOWNregulated, "Results/UpDownSplit/DOWN/ALL/DEGs_GOallontology_FLWMLW_downregulated.csv")


#Less than .01
DEG.DOWN_BP.FLWMLW.table.01 <- DEG.DOWN_BP.FLWMLW.table[DEG.DOWN_BP.FLWMLW.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG.DOWN_MF.FLWMLW.table.01 <- DEG.DOWN_MF.FLWMLW.table[DEG.DOWN_MF.FLWMLW.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]
DEG.DOWN_CC.FLWMLW.table.01 <- DEG.DOWN_CC.FLWMLW.table[DEG.DOWN_CC.FLWMLW.table$raw.p.value < 0.01,]

DEG_GOallontology.FLWMLW.DOWNregulated.01 <-rbind(DEG.DOWN_BP.FLWMLW.table.01, DEG.DOWN_MF.FLWMLW.table.01, DEG.DOWN_CC.FLWMLW.table.01)
write.csv(DEG_GOallontology.FLWMLW.DOWNregulated.01, "Results/UpDownSplit/point1percent/DEGs_GOallontology_FLWMLW_downregulated.01.csv")
```



```{r extractgenesforGOs.FLWMLW}
#get results table
results.FLWMLW <- list(BP.ALL = DEG_BP.FLWMLW.table,
  BP.DOWN = DEG.DOWN_BP.FLWMLW.table,
  MF.ALL = DEG_MF.FLWMLW.table,
  MF.DOWN = DEG.DOWN_MF.FLWMLW.table,
  CC.ALL = DEG_CC.FLWMLW.table,
  CC.DOWN = DEG.DOWN_CC.FLWMLW.table
)
  
#get a list of the godata objects
GOdata_list.FLWMLW <- list(
  BP.ALL = DEgenes.FLWMLW.GO.bp,
  BP.DOWN = DEgenes.FLWMLW_DOWN.GO.bp,
  MF.ALL = DEgenes.FLWMLW.GO.mf,
  MF.DOWN = DEgenes.FLWMLW_DOWN.GO.mf,
  CC.ALL = DEgenes.FLWMLW.GO.cc,
  CC.DOWN = DEgenes.FLWMLW_DOWN.GO.cc
)

#geneID Extraction

# Step 1: Filter significant GO terms (p < 0.01), handling scientific notation
sig.terms_list.FLWMLW <- lapply(results.FLWMLW, function(tbl) {
    # Ensure p-values are numeric (handles cases where they are character strings like "1.2e-5")
    pvals <- as.numeric(tbl$raw.p.value)
    
    # Return GO.IDs with p < 0.01
    tbl$GO.ID[which(pvals < 0.01)]
})

# Step 2: Extract significant genes per GO term from each GOdata object
significant_genes_per_GO.FLWMLW <- mapply(function(GOdata, go_ids) {
    # Get genes associated with each GO term
    genes_per_GO <- genesInTerm(object = GOdata, whichGO = go_ids)
    # Get significant genes from the GOdata object
    sigGenesSet <- sigGenes(GOdata)
    # Intersect genes in each GO term with the significant genes
    lapply(genes_per_GO, function(genes) intersect(genes, sigGenesSet))
  },
GOdata_list.FLWMLW,
sig.terms_list.FLWMLW,
SIMPLIFY = FALSE)



#plus terms
# Make a named vector of GO terms (Term names), per group
go_term_names_list.FLWMLW <- lapply(results.FLWMLW, function(tbl) {
  setNames(tbl$Term, tbl$GO.ID)
})



####This is the function that will be used across PW comparisons
#write_sig_genes_per_GO_to_excel()


write_sig_genes_per_GO_to_excel(
  sig_gene_list = significant_genes_per_GO.FLWMLW,
  go_term_name_list = go_term_names_list.FLWMLW,
  output_file = "Results/GenesPerGO/FLWMLW_significant_genes_per_GO.xlsx"
)



#Verify the overlap of genes between all, up, down
#BP
genesFLWMLW_BP_ALL <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLWMLW$BP.ALL))
genesFLWMLW_BP_DOWN <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLWMLW$BP.DOWN))

  #OVERLAP
  intersect(genesFLWMLW_BP_ALL, genesFLWMLW_BP_DOWN)
  table(genesFLWMLW_BP_DOWN %in% genesFLWMLW_BP_ALL)
  table(genesFLWMLW_BP_DOWN %in% names(DEG.genelist.FLWMLW))



#MF
genesFLWMLW_MF_ALL <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLWMLW$MF.ALL))
genesFLWMLW_MF_DOWN <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLWMLW$MF.DOWN))

  #OVERLAP
  intersect(genesFLWMLW_MF_ALL, genesFLWMLW_MF_DOWN)
  table(genesFLWMLW_MF_DOWN %in% genesFLWMLW_MF_ALL)
  table(genesFLWMLW_MF_DOWN %in% names(DEG.genelist.FLWMLW))



#CC
genesFLWMLW_CC_ALL <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLWMLW$CC.ALL))
genesFLWMLW_CC_DOWN <- unique(unlist(significant_genes_per_GO.FLWMLW$CC.DOWN))


  #OVERLAP
  intersect(genesFLWMLW_CC_ALL, genesFLWMLW_CC_DOWN)
  table(genesFLWMLW_CC_DOWN %in% genesFLWMLW_CC_ALL)
  table(genesFLWMLW_CC_DOWN %in% names(DEG.genelist.FLWMLW))


```


## Get Gene Lists for GO IDs of interest
```{r saveforgenework}
save(significant_genes_per_GO.FLQQLQ, significant_genes_per_GO.FLQMLQ, significant_genes_per_GO.FLWFLQ, significant_genes_per_GO.FLWMLW, significant_genes_per_GO.MLWMLQ, significant_genes_per_GO.QLWQLQ, file = "Results/GenesPerGO/SignificantGenesPerGO.Rdata")

```


### Create Vector of GO IDs of interest
```{r GOIDs}
#Use when not knitting whole docu
load("Results/GenesPerGO/SignificantGenesPerGO.Rdata")

GOvector <- c("GO:0007631", "GO:0019563", "GO:0004371", "GO:0004970", "GO:0022008", "GO:0045202", "GO:0004890", "GO:0007218", "GO:0062129", "GO:0035725", "GO:0019367", "GO:0034625", "GO:0034626", "GO:0042761", "GO:0006680", "GO:0006629", "GO:0005615", "GO:0034464", "GO:0004181", "GO:0071683", "GO:0007601", "GO:0007602","GO:0050911", "GO:0019230", "GO:0050954", "GO:0004984", "GO:0016499", "GO:0015179", "GO:0005576", "GO:0004707"

)



GeneObj <- list(
  FLQQLQ=significant_genes_per_GO.FLQQLQ,
  FLQMLQ=significant_genes_per_GO.FLQMLQ,
  FLWFLQ=significant_genes_per_GO.FLWFLQ,
  FLWMLW=significant_genes_per_GO.FLWMLW,
  MLWMLQ=significant_genes_per_GO.MLWMLQ,
  QLWQLQ=significant_genes_per_GO.QLWQLQ
)
```


### Function to Isolate Genes for GOs of interest
```{r GOIDstoGENES, include=FALSE}
extract_genes_by_go <- function(go_terms, objects) {
  if (!is.list(objects)) stop("`objects` must be a list of GO objects")
  
  result <- lapply(go_terms, function(go) {
    # collect genes from all objects and all slots
    all_genes <- unlist(lapply(names(objects), function(obj_name) {
      obj <- objects[[obj_name]]
      
      # loop through all slots in this object
      genes_in_obj <- unlist(lapply(names(obj), function(slot_name) {
        slot_obj <- obj[[slot_name]]
        if (go %in% names(slot_obj)) {
          return(slot_obj[[go]])
        } else {
          message("GO term ", go, " not found in ", obj_name, " (", slot_name, ")")
          return(character(0))
        }
      }))
      
      return(genes_in_obj)
    }))
    
    return(unique(all_genes))
  })
  
  # Clean names: remove ":" from GO IDs
  names(result) <- gsub(":", "", go_terms)
  return(result)
}


genes_byGO <- extract_genes_by_go(go_terms = GOvector, objects = GeneObj)
```


```{r loadincountdata}
#load in the same count matrix used for WGCNA
rawCounts0 <- read.csv2("../../../RNASeqAnalysis/BimpMB_RNAanalysis/Filtering/GECountData_GenesOutliers_Filtered.csv", sep=";")
head(rawCounts0)
dim(rawCounts0)


#Read in with samples as column names and gene as column 1



#load in the sample mappings
sampleData0 <- read.delim("../../../RNASeqAnalysis/BimpMB_RNAanalysis/Filtering/sampleData_OutliersRemoved.csv", sep=";")
head(sampleData0)

# Also save a copy for later
#sampleData <- sampleData0
```

```{r dosomereformating}

rawCounts <- rawCounts0
rownames(rawCounts) <- rawCounts$X
rawCounts <- rawCounts[,-1]

sampleData <- sampleData0
rownames(sampleData) <- sampleData$sample_id
sampleData <- sampleData[,1:2]


counts_pm <- cpm(rawCounts, log=TRUE)
# Make counts_pm a data frame and keep gene names
counts_df <- counts_pm %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "gene")

```


## Compare Counts (pm) of genes of interest
### GO:0007631 - FEEDING BEHAVIOR
```{r FBgenes}
FBGene <- genes_byGO$GO0007631

FBGeneCounts_lcpm <- counts_df %>%
  filter(gene %in% FBGene)

#as.data.frame
#as.data.frame(FBGeneCounts_lcpm)
#colnames(FBGeneCounts_lcpm) <- FBGene[1]


# Pivot longer so each row is gene × sample
FBGeneCounts_lcpm_long <- FBGeneCounts_lcpm %>%
  pivot_longer(-gene, names_to = "sample_id", values_to = "expression")

# Join metadata
FBGeneCounts_lcpm_long <- FBGeneCounts_lcpm_long %>%
  left_join(sampleData, by = c("sample_id" = "sample_id"))

FBGeneCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group <- factor(FBGeneCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group, levels= c("FLW", "FLQ", "MLW", "MLQ", "QLW", "QLQ"))


#Make PLOT
ggplot(FBGeneCounts_lcpm_long, aes(x = tx_group, y = expression, fill = tx_group)) + #, label = sample_id)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  #geom_text(position = position_jitter(seed = 1)) +
  #facet_wrap(~Gene, scales = "free_y") + # One plot per gene
  theme_minimal() +
    labs(
    title = "Gene: LOC100742013 (GO:0007631-FEEDING BEHAVIOR)",
    x = "Treatment Group",
    y = "Log-CPM Expression"
    ) +
theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

```



### GO:00016499 - OREXIN RECEPTOR ACTIVITY (MF)
```{r ORAGenes, fig.height=6}
ORAGenes <- genes_byGO$GO0016499

ORAGenesCounts_lcpm <- counts_df %>%
  filter(gene %in% ORAGenes)

#as.data.frame
#as.data.frame(FBGeneCounts_lcpm)
#colnames(FBGeneCounts_lcpm) <- FBGene[1]


# Pivot longer so each row is gene × sample
ORAGenesCounts_lcpm_long <- ORAGenesCounts_lcpm %>%
  pivot_longer(-gene, names_to = "sample_id", values_to = "expression")

# Join metadata
ORAGenesCounts_lcpm_long <- ORAGenesCounts_lcpm_long %>%
  left_join(sampleData, by = c("sample_id" = "sample_id"))

ORAGenesCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group <- factor(ORAGenesCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group, levels= c("FLW", "FLQ", "MLW", "MLQ", "QLW", "QLQ"))


#Make PLOT
# Multipanel plot for all genes in this GO term
ggplot(ORAGenesCounts_lcpm_long, aes(x = tx_group, y = expression, fill = tx_group)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~gene, scales = "free_y", ncol=2) +  # one panel per gene
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "GO:00016499 - orexin receptor activity",
    x = "Treatment Group",
    y = "Log-CPM Expression"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 10) # facet labels
  )

```



### GO:0007218 - NEUROPEPTIDE SIGNALLING
```{r NPGenes}
NPGene <- genes_byGO$GO0007218

NPGeneCounts_lcpm <- counts_df %>%
  filter(gene %in% NPGene)

#as.data.frame
#as.data.frame(NPGeneCounts_lcpm)
#colnames(NPGeneCounts_lcpm) <- NPGene[1]

NPGeneCounts_lcpm_long <- NPGeneCounts_lcpm %>%
  pivot_longer(-gene, names_to = "sample_id", values_to = "expression")

# Join metadata
NPGeneCounts_lcpm_long <- NPGeneCounts_lcpm_long %>%
  left_join(sampleData, by = c("sample_id" = "sample_id"))

NPGeneCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group <- factor(NPGeneCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group, levels= c("FLW", "FLQ", "MLW", "MLQ", "QLW", "QLQ"))


#Make PLOT
ggplot(NPGeneCounts_lcpm_long, aes(x = tx_group, y = expression, fill = tx_group)) + #, label = sample_id)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  #geom_text(position = position_jitter(seed = 1)) +
  #facet_wrap(~Gene, scales = "free_y") + # One plot per gene
  theme_minimal() +
    labs(
    title = "Gene: LOC100745005 (GO:0007218 - Neuropeptide Signalling)",
    x = "Treatment Group",
    y = "Log-CPM Expression"
    ) +
theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

```



### GO:0022008 - NEUROGENESIS

```{r NGGenes, fig.height=9}
NGGenes <- genes_byGO$GO0022008

NGGenesCounts_lcpm <- counts_df %>%
  filter(gene %in% NGGenes)

#as.data.frame
#as.data.frame(FBGeneCounts_lcpm)

  pivot_longer(-gene, names_to = "sample_id", values_to = "expression")

# Join metadata

  left_join(sampleData, by = c("sample_id" = "sample_id"))

NGGenesCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group <- factor(NGGenesCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group, levels= c("FLW", "FLQ", "MLW", "MLQ", "QLW", "QLQ"))

  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
```

### GO:0045202 - SYNAPSE
```{r SynGenes, fig.height=9}
SynGenes <- genes_byGO$GO0045202

SynGenesCounts_lcpm <- counts_df %>%
  filter(gene %in% SynGenes)

#as.data.frame
#as.data.frame(FBGeneCounts_lcpm)
#colnames(FBGeneCounts_lcpm) <- FBGene[1]


# Pivot longer so each row is gene × sample
SynGenesCounts_lcpm_long <- SynGenesCounts_lcpm %>%
  pivot_longer(-gene, names_to = "sample_id", values_to = "expression")

# Join metadata
SynGenesCounts_lcpm_long <- SynGenesCounts_lcpm_long %>%
  left_join(sampleData, by = c("sample_id" = "sample_id"))

SynGenesCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group <- factor(SynGenesCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group, levels= c("FLW", "FLQ", "MLW", "MLQ", "QLW", "QLQ"))


#Make PLOT
ggplot(SynGenesCounts_lcpm_long, aes(x = tx_group, y = expression, fill = tx_group)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~gene, scales = "free_y", ncol=2) +  # one panel per gene
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "GO:0045202 - Synapse (CC)",
    x = "Treatment Group",
    y = "Log-CPM Expression"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 10) # facet labels
  )
```



### GO:0004707 - MAP KINASE ACTIVITY
```{r MAPGenes, fig.height=9}
MAPGenes <- genes_byGO$GO0004707

MAPGenesCounts_lcpm <- counts_df %>%
  filter(gene %in% MAPGenes)

#as.data.frame
#as.data.frame(FBGeneCounts_lcpm)
#colnames(FBGeneCounts_lcpm) <- FBGene[1]


# Pivot longer so each row is gene × sample
MAPGenesCounts_lcpm_long <- MAPGenesCounts_lcpm %>%
  pivot_longer(-gene, names_to = "sample_id", values_to = "expression")

# Join metadata
MAPGenesCounts_lcpm_long <- MAPGenesCounts_lcpm_long %>%
  left_join(sampleData, by = c("sample_id" = "sample_id"))

MAPGenesCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group <- factor(MAPGenesCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group, levels= c("FLW", "FLQ", "MLW", "MLQ", "QLW", "QLQ"))


#Make PLOT
ggplot(MAPGenesCounts_lcpm_long, aes(x = tx_group, y = expression, fill = tx_group)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~gene, scales = "free_y", ncol=2) +  # one panel per gene
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "GO:0004707 - MAP kinase activity (MF)",
    x = "Treatment Group",
    y = "Log-CPM Expression"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 10) # facet labels
  )
```




### GO:0035725 - SODIUM ION TRANSMEMBRANE TRANSPORT
```{r SITTGenes, fig.height=8}
SITTGenes <- genes_byGO$GO0035725

SITTGenesCounts_lcpm <- counts_df %>%
  filter(gene %in% SITTGenes)

#as.data.frame

  pivot_longer(-gene, names_to = "sample_id", values_to = "expression")

#Make PLOT

  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~gene, scales = "free_y", ncol=2) +  # one panel per gene
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "GO:0035725 - sodium ion transmembrane transport",
    x = "Treatment Group",
    y = "Log-CPM Expression"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 10) # facet labels
  )

```

### GO:0050954 - Sensory Perception of mechanical stimuli
```{r PMSGenes, fig.height=6}
PMSGenes <- genes_byGO$GO0050954

PMSGenesCounts_lcpm <- counts_df %>%
  filter(gene %in% PMSGenes)

#as.data.frame

#colnames(FBGeneCounts_lcpm) <- FBGene[1]


# Pivot longer so each row is gene × sample

  pivot_longer(-gene, names_to = "sample_id", values_to = "exPMSession")

# Join metadata
PMSGenesCounts_lcpm_long <- PMSGenesCounts_lcpm_long %>%
  left_join(sampleData, by = c("sample_id" = "sample_id"))

PMSGenesCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group <- factor(PMSGenesCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group, levels= c("FLW", "FLQ", "MLW", "MLQ", "QLW", "QLQ"))


#Make PLOT
# Multipanel plot for all genes in this GO term

  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~gene, scales = "free_y", ncol=2) +  # one panel per gene
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "GO:0050954 - Sensory perception of mechanical stimuli",
    x = "Treatment Group",
    y = "Log-CPM Expression"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 10) # facet labels
  )

```




### GO:0007601; GO:0007602 - VISUAL PERCEPTION AND PHOTOTRANSDUCTION
```{r VPPGenes, fig.height=6}
VPPGenes <- c(genes_byGO$GO0007601, genes_byGO$GO0007602)

VPPGenesCounts_lcpm <- counts_df %>%
  filter(gene %in% VPPGenes)

#as.data.frame
#as.data.frame(FBGeneCounts_lcpm)
#colnames(FBGeneCounts_lcpm) <- FBGene[1]


# Pivot longer so each row is gene × sample
VPPGenesCounts_lcpm_long <- VPPGenesCounts_lcpm %>%
  pivot_longer(-gene, names_to = "sample_id", values_to = "exVPPession")

# Join metadata
VPPGenesCounts_lcpm_long <- VPPGenesCounts_lcpm_long %>%
  left_join(sampleData, by = c("sample_id" = "sample_id"))

VPPGenesCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group <- factor(VPPGenesCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group, levels= c("FLW", "FLQ", "MLW", "MLQ", "QLW", "QLQ"))


#Make PLOT
# Multipanel plot for all genes in this GO term
ggplot(VPPGenesCounts_lcpm_long, aes(x = tx_group, y = exVPPession, fill = tx_group)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~gene, scales = "free_y", ncol=2) +  # one panel per gene
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "GO:0007601 - Visual perception (both genes) & GO:0007602 - phototransduction (LOC100746131)",
    x = "Treatment Group",
    y = "Log-CPM Expression"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 10) # facet labels
  )

```

```{r SPOGenes, fig.height=6}
  pivot_longer(-gene, names_to = "sample_id", values_to = "exSPOession")

  left_join(sampleData, by = c("sample_id" = "sample_id"))

  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +

  labs(

    x = "Treatment Group",

  ) +
```

 





### GO:0004371 - GLYCERONE KINASE ACTIVITY
```{r GKAGenes, fig.height=6}
GKAGenes <- genes_byGO$GO0004371

GKAGenesCounts_lcpm <- counts_df %>%
  filter(gene %in% GKAGenes)

#as.data.frame
#as.data.frame(FBGeneCounts_lcpm)
#colnames(FBGeneCounts_lcpm) <- FBGene[1]


# Pivot longer so each row is gene × sample
GKAGenesCounts_lcpm_long <- GKAGenesCounts_lcpm %>%
  pivot_longer(-gene, names_to = "sample_id", values_to = "expression")

# Join metadata
GKAGenesCounts_lcpm_long <- GKAGenesCounts_lcpm_long %>%
  left_join(sampleData, by = c("sample_id" = "sample_id"))

GKAGenesCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group <- factor(GKAGenesCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group, levels= c("FLW", "FLQ", "MLW", "MLQ", "QLW", "QLQ"))


#Make PLOT
# Multipanel plot for all genes in this GO term
ggplot(GKAGenesCounts_lcpm_long, aes(x = tx_group, y = expression, fill = tx_group)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~gene, scales = "free_y") +  # one panel per gene
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "GO:0004371 - Glycerone Kinase Activity",
    x = "Treatment Group",
    y = "Log-CPM Expression"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 10) # facet labels
  )

```






### GO:0019367, GO:0034625, GO:0034626, GO:0042761 - FATTY ACID LONGATION AND BIOSYNTHESIS (single gene: LOC100749525)
There is a single significant gene across these 4 similar go terms. So, considering them all here.
```{r FAEBGenes, fig.height=3}
FAEBGenes <- genes_byGO$GO0019367

FAEBGenesCounts_lcpm <- counts_df %>%
  filter(gene %in% FAEBGenes)

#as.data.frame
#as.data.frame(FBGeneCounts_lcpm)
#colnames(FBGeneCounts_lcpm) <- FBGene[1]


# Pivot longer so each row is gene × sample
FAEBGenesCounts_lcpm_long <- FAEBGenesCounts_lcpm %>%
  pivot_longer(-gene, names_to = "sample_id", values_to = "expression")

# Join metadata
FAEBGenesCounts_lcpm_long <- FAEBGenesCounts_lcpm_long %>%
  left_join(sampleData, by = c("sample_id" = "sample_id"))

FAEBGenesCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group <- factor(FAEBGenesCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group, levels= c("FLW", "FLQ", "MLW", "MLQ", "QLW", "QLQ"))


#Make PLOT
# Multipanel plot for all genes in this GO term
ggplot(FAEBGenesCounts_lcpm_long, aes(x = tx_group, y = expression, fill = tx_group)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~gene, scales = "free_y") +  # one panel per gene
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "GO:0019367, GO:0034625, GO:0034626, GO:0042761 - fatty acid elongation and biosynthesis",
    x = "Treatment Group",
    y = "Log-CPM Expression"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 10) # facet labels
  )

```








### GO:0062129 - CHITIN-BASED EXTRACELLULAR MATRIX

```{r CBEMGenes, fig.height=6}
CBEMGenes <- genes_byGO$GO0062129

CBEMGenesCounts_lcpm <- counts_df %>%
  filter(gene %in% CBEMGenes)

#as.data.frame
#as.data.frame(FBGeneCounts_lcpm)
#colnames(FBGeneCounts_lcpm) <- FBGene[1]


# Pivot longer so each row is gene × sample
CBEMGenesCounts_lcpm_long <- CBEMGenesCounts_lcpm %>%
  pivot_longer(-gene, names_to = "sample_id", values_to = "expression")

# Join metadata
CBEMGenesCounts_lcpm_long <- CBEMGenesCounts_lcpm_long %>%
  left_join(sampleData, by = c("sample_id" = "sample_id"))

CBEMGenesCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group <- factor(CBEMGenesCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group, levels= c("FLW", "FLQ", "MLW", "MLQ", "QLW", "QLQ"))


#Make PLOT
# Multipanel plot for all genes in this GO term
ggplot(CBEMGenesCounts_lcpm_long, aes(x = tx_group, y = expression, fill = tx_group)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~gene, scales = "free_y", ncol=2) +  # one panel per gene
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "GO:0062129 - chitin-based extracellular matrix
",
    x = "Treatment Group",
    y = "Log-CPM Expression"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 10) # facet labels
  )

```

```{r LAATTAGenes, fig.height=6}
  pivot_longer(-gene, names_to = "sample_id", values_to = "expression")

# Join metadata

  left_join(sampleData, by = c("sample_id" = "sample_id"))
```

### GO:0005576 - EXTRACELLULAR REGION (cc)

```{r ECRGenes, fig.height=6}
ECRGenes <- genes_byGO$GO0005576

  filter(gene %in% ECRGenes)

  pivot_longer(-gene, names_to = "sample_id", values_to = "expression")

# Join metadata
ECRGenesCounts_lcpm_long <- ECRGenesCounts_lcpm_long %>%
  left_join(sampleData, by = c("sample_id" = "sample_id"))

ECRGenesCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group <- factor(ECRGenesCounts_lcpm_long$tx_group, levels= c("FLW", "FLQ", "MLW", "MLQ", "QLW", "QLQ"))


#Make PLOT

ggplot(ECRGenesCounts_lcpm_long, aes(x = tx_group, y = expression, fill = tx_group)) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~gene, scales = "free_y", ncol=2) +  # one panel per gene

    x = "Treatment Group",
    y = "Log-CPM Expression"
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 10) # facet labels
  )

```









# Trying to locate the GO assigned to Gene LOC105680522 and LOC117151569

## Looking for Gene ID: LOC105680522
Gene LOC105680522 is the last of the 6 DEGs across all across caste TX groups. I can't determine its GO assignment using the sig go terms, so I am trying to ID across all GOs. Reworking here as not to interfere with analysis. 
```{r findingLOC105680522}

LOC105680522 <- "LOC105680522"

FLWFLQ_GOs <- c(DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.UPregulated$GO.ID, DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.DOWNregulated$GO.ID)

ID_LOC105680522 <- unique(FLWFLQ_GOs)


#GOs_FLWFLQ <- genesInTerm(object = DEgenes.FLWFLQ.GO.bp, whichGO = ID_LOC105680522)
#GOforLOC105680522 <- LOC105680522[LOC105680522 %in% unlist(GOs_FLWFLQ)]
#GOforLOC105680522
# Combine your GO objects into a named list
GOobjects <- list(
  BP.up = DEgenes.FLWFLQ_UP.GO.bp,
  MF.up = DEgenes.FLWFLQ_UP.GO.mf,
  CC.up = DEgenes.FLWFLQ_UP.GO.cc,
  BP.down = DEgenes.FLWFLQ_DOWN.GO.bp,
  MF.down = DEgenes.FLWFLQ_DOWN.GO.mf,
  CC.down = DEgenes.FLWFLQ_DOWN.GO.cc
)




# function: find all GO terms across BP, MF, CC
find_gene_in_all_GO <- function(gene, GOlist) {
  result <- list()
  
  for (ont in names(GOlist)) {
    go_terms <- GOlist[[ont]]
    
    # ensure the inner structure is a list (each GO term = vector of genes)
    if (!is.list(go_terms)) next
    
    # find which GO terms contain the gene
    matched_terms <- names(Filter(function(gvec) gene %in% gvec, go_terms))
    
    result[[ont]] <- matched_terms
  }
  
  result
}


GOmatches_LOC105680522 <- find_gene_in_all_GO(
  LOC105680522,
  significant_genes_per_GO.FLWFLQ
)

GOmatches_LOC105680522



```

Okay, we aren't finding the Gene among our go terms. There are a few possibilities: 1) the function doesn't work, 2) the gene isn't in the gene universe, 3) the gene is among the NAs removed, and 4) the gene hasn't been annotated. I will assess these in that order.

### 1) Test gene locating function
Testing the function with a gene we know is there!
```{r testingfun}

gene_known <- "LOC100742982"

GOmatches_LOC100742982 <- find_gene_in_all_GO(
  gene_known,
  significant_genes_per_GO.FLWFLQ
)

GOmatches_LOC100742982

```


### 2) See if the gene is in the universe
Checking to make sure it is in the gene universe.
```{r geneuniversecheck}

LOC105680522 %in% geneUniverse

```

The gene is present in the gene universe.

### 3) Was the gene removed as an outlier pre-Fisher test
Checking to make sure it is not one of the NAs removed.
```{r outliercheck}

LOC105680522 %in% FLWFLQ_napos

```

It is not a gene that was removed as an outlier.


### 4) Has the gene been annotated
Checking to make sure the gene has been annotated (i.e., is in your gene2Mapping annotation file).
```{r annotationcheck}

LOC105680522 %in% gene2mapping

```

The gene is not in the mapping file. Therefore, I am concluding that **LOC105680522** hasn't been annotated.



## Looking for Gene ID: LOC117151569
Gene LOC117151569 is the last of the 6 DEGs across all across caste TX groups. I can't determine its GO assignment using the sig go terms, so I am trying to ID across all GOs. Reworking here as not to interfere with analysis. 
```{r findingLOC117151569}

LOC117151569 <- "LOC117151569"

FLWFLQ_GOs <- c(DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.UPregulated$GO.ID, DEG_GOallontology.FLWFLQ.DOWNregulated$GO.ID)

ID_LOC117151569 <- unique(FLWFLQ_GOs)


#GOobject and function already made when testing the prior gene




GOmatches_LOC117151569 <- find_gene_in_all_GO(
  LOC117151569,
  significant_genes_per_GO.FLWFLQ
)

GOmatches_LOC117151569



```






Okay, we aren't finding the Gene among our go terms. There are a few possibilities: 1) the function doesn't work, 2) the gene isn't in the gene universe, 3) the gene is among the NAs removed, and 4) the gene hasn't been annotated. I will assess these in that order.

### 1) Test gene locating function
The same function as before, so we know it works.


### 2) See if the gene is in the universe
Checking to make sure it is in the gene universe.
```{r geneuniversecheck_LOC117151569}

LOC117151569 %in% geneUniverse

```

The gene is present in the gene universe.

### 3) Was the gene removed as an outlier pre-Fisher test
Checking to make sure it is not one of the NAs removed.
```{r outliercheck_LOC117151569}

LOC117151569 %in% FLWFLQ_napos

```

It is not a gene that was removed as an outlier.


### 4) Has the gene been annotated
Checking to make sure the gene has been annotated (i.e., is in your gene2Mapping annotation file).
```{r annotationcheck_LOC117151569}

LOC117151569 %in% gene2mapping

```

The gene is not in the mapping file. Therefore, I am concluding that **LOC117151569** hasn't been annotated.
